V006-N01054.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01054.label: 蜂毒疗法
V006-N01054.aliases: 蜂螯疗法； 蜂针疗法
V006-N01054.definition: 根据针灸原理，利用蜜蜂等尾部的螯针,螯刺人体穴位或特定部位，通过其泌出的蜜蜂毒素等综合作用，以防治疾病的一种疗法。

V006-N01054.label: 蜂毒疗法
V006-N01054.aliases: 蜂针疗法； 蜂螫疗法； Bee Toxin Therapy
V006-N01054.englishNames: beetoxin therapy; bee venom therapy; Bee Venom Therapy
V006-N01054.pinyinNames: feng dong liao fa; feng du liao fa
V006-N01054.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜杂疗法

V006-N01054.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01054.label: 蜂针疗法
V006-N01054.englishNames: Bee-sting therapy; bee sting and verom therapy
V006-N01054.pinyinNames: fēng zhēn liáo fǎ; feng zhen liao fa
V006-N01054.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01054.definition: A therapy to use the sting from a live bee (mechanical stimulation) and venom (pharmacological action) in the treatment of health conditions.

V006-N01078.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01078.label: 磁穴疗法
V006-N01078.aliases: 磁场敷贴穴位疗法； 磁针疗法
V006-N01078.path: 疗法类术语｜外治疗法｜其他外治疗法
V006-N01078.definition: 运用磁场作用于人体腧穴或患病部位，以治疗疾病的一种外治疗法。

V006-N01078.label: 磁穴疗法
V006-N01078.aliases: 磁场敷贴穴位疗法； 磁针疗法
V006-N01078.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜外治疗法

V006-N01081.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01081.label: 穴位埋线疗法
V006-N01081.path: 疗法类术语｜外治疗法｜其他外治疗法
V006-N01081.definition: 将羊肠线埋入相关穴位，利用羊肠线对穴位的持续刺激作用,以治疗相应疾病的一种外治疗法。

V006-N01081.label: 穴位埋线疗法
V006-N01081.englishNames: Catgut Embedment in Acupoint Therapy; catgut-embedding therapy
V006-N01081.pinyinNames: xue wei mai xian liao fa
V006-N01081.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜外治疗法

V006-N00979.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N00979.label: 敷脐疗法
V006-N00979.path: 疗法类术语｜外治疗法｜脐部疗法
V006-N00979.definition: 将配制药物或特制膏贴剂等敷置于脐部，发挥其药物与刺激神阙穴的双重治疗作用,以防治相应疾病的一种脐部疗法。

V006-N00979.label: 敷脐疗法
V006-N00979.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜外治法
V006-N00979.definition: 将药物敷置于脐眼或脐部，以治疗眩晕、盗汗、便秘、尿闭、遗精、阳痿、阴挺、痛经等病证的方法。

V006-N00979.label: 敷脐疗法
V006-N00979.aliases: 脐疗； 脐疗法； 敷脐； Administration on Umbilicus
V006-N00979.englishNames: umbilical compress therapy; umbilicus-application therapy; Umbilical Compress Therapy
V006-N00979.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜外治疗法

V006-N01007.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01007.label: 刺血疗法
V006-N01007.definition: 用针具或刀具刺破或划破人体特定的穴位或相关部位，放出少量血液，以治疗疾病的一种外治疗法。

V006-N01007.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01007.label: 三棱针疗法
V006-N01007.path: 疗法类术语｜针灸疗法｜针刺疗法
V006-N01007.definition: 运用特制的针身呈三棱状、三边及针尖开刃的不锈钢针具,在相关腧穴或浅表血络针刺放出少量血液，以治疗相关疾病的一种针刺疗法。

V006-N01007.label: 三棱针疗法
V006-N01007.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01007.definition: 利用三棱针刺破皮肤浅表部或小静脉，使之少量出血以治疗疾病的方法。

V006-N01007.label: 刺血疗法
V006-N01007.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜外治疗法

V006-N01007.label: 三棱针疗法
V006-N01007.englishNames: Three Edged Needle Therapy; three-edged needle therapy
V006-N01007.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N01007.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01007.label: 刺络法
V006-N01007.englishNames: Collateral-pricking method; pricking bloodletting method; collateral pricking
V006-N01007.pinyinNames: cì luò fǎ; ci luo fa
V006-N01007.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01007.definition: A needling technique to prick superficial collaterals using a three-edged or a (single-use, disposable) seven-star needle to let out appropriate amount of blood.

V006-N01007.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01007.label: 刺络法

V006-N01089.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01089.label: 割治疗法
V006-N01089.definition: 运用刀、针等器械，在体表特定治疗部位或经络腧穴上进行切割挑治，通过刺激切口内组织，或摘取少量皮下组织、切除多余赘生物等方式达到治疗目的的一种外治疗法。

V006-N01089.label: 割治疗法
V006-N01089.aliases: 割脂疗法； 割治法； Cutting Method
V006-N01089.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜外治疗法

V006-N01052.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01052.label: 针刀疗法
V006-N01052.aliases: 小针刀疗法； 微针刀疗法； 针刀技术； 中医微创技术
V006-N01052.definition: 采用各种前端带刃和兼具针、刀特征的器具,刺入特定部位或阿是穴深部后进行切、割、剥、铲等针刀手法操作,以获得理筋减张、舒筋通络、滑利关节、解痉镇痛等效应而治疗相关疾病的一种外治疗法。

V006-N01052.label: 小针刀疗法
V006-N01052.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜外治疗法｜割治疗法

V006-N00986.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N00986.label: 拔罐疗法
V006-N00986.aliases: 吸筒疗法； 拔火罐； 角法
V006-N00986.definition: 运用各种罐具,通过排去其中空气所产生的负压，使之吸附于皮肤表面，造成被拔部位局部充血、瘀血,获得激发经气、拔毒排脓等效应，以防治相关疾病的一种外治疗法。

V006-N00986.label: 拔罐疗法
V006-N00986.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00986.definition: 利用罐内的负压,使罐吸附于施术部位，造成瘀血现象来治疗疾病的方法。

V006-N00986.label: 拔罐疗法
V006-N00986.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜骨伤科学｜治疗
V006-N00986.definition: 以杯罐为工具，利用燃烧的热力，排去其中的空气，产生负压，使之吸着于皮肤，造成被拔部位的皮肤郁血现象，以治疗疾病。适用于痹病、头痛、眩晕、月经病、目疾、丹毒等。

V006-N00986.label: 拔罐疗法
V006-N00986.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜外治疗法

V006-N00975.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N00975.label: 发泡疗法
V006-N00975.path: 疗法类术语｜外治疗法｜敷贴疗法
V006-N00975.definition: 将某些能引起皮肤发泡的药物，捣碎敷在相关穴位或部位上，使之发泡，以治疗相关疾病的一种敷贴疗法。

V006-N00975.label: 发泡疗法
V006-N00975.aliases: 天灸疗法； 发泡疗法（中医）
V006-N00975.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜外治疗法｜敷贴疗法

V006-N00975.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00975.label: 天灸
V006-N00975.aliases: 发泡灸； 药物发泡法； Scarring moxibustion
V006-N00975.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00975.definition: A method to apply irritants to the selected area to produce congestion and blistering.

V006-N00975.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00975.label: 天灸

V006-N01076.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01076.label: 刮痧疗法
V006-N01076.definition: 用边缘光滑的嫩竹板、小汤匙、铜钱、瓷器片等为工具,蘸食油或清水在体表部位进行由上而下、由内向外反复刮动，刮至出现紫红色的条痕或斑块为度，以治疗疾病的一种外治疗法。

V006-N01076.label: 刮痧疗法
V006-N01076.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜外治法
V006-N01076.definition: 用边缘光滑的羊角、牛角片，或嫩竹板、瓷器片、小汤匙、铜钱、硬币、纽扣等工具，蘸润滑油,或清水,或药液、药油在体表部位进行反复刮动，以治疗“痧证”及中暑、感冒、喉痛、腹痛、吐泻、头昏脑胀等病证的方法。

V006-N01076.label: 刮痧疗法
V006-N01076.englishNames: cutaneous scrapping therapy; Scraping Therapy; scrapping therapy
V006-N01076.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜外治疗法

V006-N01076.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01076.label: 刮痧疗法
V006-N01076.pinyinNames: guā shā liáo fǎ; gua sha liao fa
V006-N01076.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01076.definition: A method to scrape the skin repeatedly using a soup spoon or other smooth-edged instruments (such as horned animal bones, water buffalo horn or jade). The skin is often lubricated with massage oil or water.

V006-N01077.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01077.label: 撮痧疗法
V006-N01077.aliases: 捏痧疗法； 抓痧疗法； 撮痧技术
V006-N01077.path: 疗法类术语｜外治疗法｜刮痧疗法
V006-N01077.definition: 在患者体表特定部位或穴位上，用手指反复捏扯出若干个橄榄状充血斑块，以防治疾病的一种刮痧疗法。

V006-N01077.label: 刮痧疗法
V006-N01077.englishNames: cutaneous scrapping therapy; Scraping Therapy; scrapping therapy
V006-N01077.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜外治疗法

V006-N01077.label: 撮痧疗法
V006-N01077.aliases: 捏痧疗法； 抓痧疗法
V006-N01077.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜外治疗法｜刮痧疗法

V006-N00969.label: 熨法
V006-N00969.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜外科学｜治疗
V006-N00969.definition: 把药物加酒、醋炒热，布包熨摩患处，使理疏通而达到治疗目的的外治法。

V006-N00969.label: 药熨疗法
V006-N00969.aliases: 热奄包法； 热熨疗法； 穴位热敷疗法； 药包热敷熨法； 熨法
V006-N00969.englishNames: Hot Medicinal Compress Therapy; medicated compress therapy; hot medicinal compress therapy
V006-N00969.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜外治疗法

V006-N00969.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00969.label: 熨法

V006-N00969.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00969.label: 熨法
V006-N00969.englishNames: hot medicinal compress; hot medicated compress
V006-N00969.definition: a therapeutic measure involving pressing and rubbing the diseased area with hot medical substances wrapped in cloth

V006-N00703.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N00703.label: 针灸疗法
V006-N00703.definition: 泛指运用特制的金属针具,针刺并配合捻转、提插等手法刺激腧穴或特定治疗部位，或将特制艾条、艾炷等直接或间接灸灼体表腧穴或特定部位，获得疏通经络腧穴、燮理气血阴阳、温通脏腑经脉及扶阳散寒等效应，以防治相应疾病的一类疗法。

V006-N00703.label: 针灸疗法
V006-N00703.englishNames: Acupuncture Moxibustion Therapy; acupuncture and moxibustion therapy

V006-N00003.label: 针灸疗法
V006-N00003.englishNames: Acupuncture Moxibustion Therapy; acupuncture and moxibustion therapy

V006-N00003.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00003.label: 针灸

V006-N01038.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01038.label: 水针疗法
V006-N01038.path: 疗法类术语｜针灸疗法｜针刺疗法
V006-N01038.definition: 根据患者病情，选用合适的注射药液注人相关腧穴，集针刺与药物治疗所长，以治疗相应疾病的一种针刺疗法。

V006-N01038.label: 水针疗法
V006-N01038.aliases: 水针； 穴位注射； 穴位注射疗法； Hydro Acupuncture
V006-N01038.englishNames: Hydro Acupuncture Therapy; water acupuncture therapy
V006-N01038.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N01038.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01038.label: 穴位注射疗法
V006-N01038.pinyinNames: xue wei zhu she liao fa

V006-N01032.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01032.label: 脉冲电针疗法
V006-N01032.path: 疗法类术语｜针灸疗法｜其他针灸疗法
V006-N01032.definition: 运用脉冲电针仪,在刺入人体相关穴位的毫针上导入脉冲电流,增强针刺得气感,以针、电刺激腧穴的综合效应治疗各种相应疾病、提高疗效的一种针灸疗法。

V006-N01032.label: 电针疗法
V006-N01032.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01032.definition: 在刺入腧穴的针具上,用电针机通电，将电流刺激和针刺结合起来治疗疾病的方法。

V006-N01032.label: 脉冲电针疗法
V006-N01032.englishNames: Pulse Electroacupuncture Therapy; pulse electro-acupuncture therapy
V006-N01032.pinyinNames: mai chong dian zhen liao fa
V006-N01032.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N01045.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01045.label: 火针疗法
V006-N01045.aliases: 燔针疗法； 烧针疗法； 火针技术
V006-N01045.path: 疗法类术语｜针灸疗法｜针刺疗法
V006-N01045.definition: 选用合适的针具,将其烧灼由红至白后迅速刺入腧穴或特定部位，采用点刺、顿刺、散刺、浅刺、深刺、割切、烙熨等手法，以治疗相应疾病的一种针刺疗法。

V006-N01045.label: 火针疗法
V006-N01045.englishNames: fire needle therapy;puncturing point with hotred needle
V006-N01045.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01045.definition: 用烧灼后的火针刺激腧穴治疗疾病的方法。

V006-N01045.label: 火针疗法
V006-N01045.englishNames: Fire Needle Therapy; heated needle therapy
V006-N01045.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N01107.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01107.label: 鼻针疗法
V006-N01107.path: 疗法类术语｜针灸疗法｜针刺疗法
V006-N01107.definition: 针刺鼻部及其周边的特定穴位，以治疗相应疾病的一种针刺疗法。

V006-N01107.label: 鼻针疗法
V006-N01107.englishNames: nose acupuncture therapy; Nose Acupuncture Therapy
V006-N01107.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N01107.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01107.label: 鼻针疗法
V006-N01107.englishNames: Nose acupuncture; nose acupuncture therapy; nose needle therapy
V006-N01107.pinyinNames: bí zhēn liáo fǎ; bi zhen liao fa
V006-N01107.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01107.definition: A therapeutic method to stimulate points on the nose with an acupuncture needle.

V006-N01043.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01043.label: 芒针疗法
V006-N01043.aliases: 长针疗法； 芒针技术
V006-N01043.path: 疗法类术语｜针灸疗法｜针刺疗法
V006-N01043.definition: 运用针身细长、形如麦芒,约125 mm～225 mm长的特制针具,点刺深透特定部位或腧穴，以防治相关疾病的一种针刺疗法。

V006-N01043.label: 芒针疗法
V006-N01043.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01043.definition: 用针身细长,形如麦芒的针具(芒针)深刺腧穴治疗疾病的方法。

V006-N01043.label: 芒针疗法
V006-N01043.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N00946.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N00946.label: 温针疗法
V006-N00946.aliases: 温针灸疗法； 针柄灸疗法
V006-N00946.path: 疗法类术语｜针灸疗法｜针刺疗法
V006-N00946.definition: 在针刺相关腧穴得气后，针柄置放艾绒,点燃后使其热力同时通过针身内传，以防治相应疾病的一种针刺疗法。

V006-N00946.label: 温针灸
V006-N00946.englishNames: warming needle moxibustion; needle warming through moxibustion
V006-N00946.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00946.definition: 用艾绒等方法加热刺入体内的针柄,是针刺与艾灸相结合治疗疾病的方法。

V006-N00946.label: 温针疗法
V006-N00946.englishNames: warm needle therapy; Needle Warming Therapy
V006-N00946.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N00946.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00946.label: 温针灸
V006-N00946.aliases: 温针、温针疗法； Needle-warming moxibustion
V006-N00946.englishNames: warming needle moxibustion; needle warming through moxibustion; warming needling; Warming needle
V006-N00946.pinyinNames: wen zhen jiu; wēn zhēn jiǔ
V006-N00946.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00946.definition: A method to fix a small section of moxa stick or cone onto the handle of an inserted needle prior to igniting.

V006-N00946.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00946.label: 温针灸

V006-N00939.label: 温和灸
V006-N00939.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00939.definition: 将艾条燃着的一端与施灸部位的皮肤保持一定距离，使患者有温热感而无灼痛的悬起灸。

V006-N00939.label: 温针疗法
V006-N00939.englishNames: warm needle therapy; Needle Warming Therapy
V006-N00939.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N00939.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00939.label: 温和灸
V006-N00939.englishNames: gentle moxibustion; Gentle moxibustion; mildwarm moxibustion
V006-N00939.pinyinNames: wen he jiu; wēn hé jiǔ
V006-N00939.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00939.definition: An indirect moxibustion method to keep the end of an ignited moxa stick at a fixed distance (2–3 cm) from the selected area, enabling a mild warm sensation.

V006-N00939.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00939.label: 温和灸

V006-N00928.label: 隔姜灸疗法
V006-N00928.englishNames: Ginger Partitioned Moxibustion Therapy; moxibustion on ginger therapy
V006-N00928.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N00928.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00928.label: 隔姜灸
V006-N00928.englishNames: ginger interposed moxibustion; moxibustion on ginger; Ginger-insulated moxibustion
V006-N00928.pinyinNames: ge jiang jiu; gé jiāng jiǔ
V006-N00928.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00928.definition: A method to place a fresh ginger slice between the moxa cone and the skin.

V006-N01041.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01041.label: 挑治疗法
V006-N01041.aliases: 挑针疗法； 挑针技术； 截根法
V006-N01041.path: 疗法类术语｜针灸疗法｜针刺疗法｜三棱针疗法
V006-N01041.definition: 运用三棱针等针具，刺入特定部位、反应点或腧穴表皮，挑断皮下筋膜纤维，或挤压出血，以治疗相应疾病的一种三棱针疗法。

V006-N01041.label: 挑治疗法
V006-N01041.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜外科学｜治疗
V006-N01041.definition: 在人体的腧穴、敏感点或一定区域内，用三棱针挑破皮肤、皮下组织，挑断部分皮下纤维，通过刺激皮肤经络使脏腑得到调理的外治法。

V006-N01041.label: 挑治疗法
V006-N01041.aliases: 针挑疗法； 截根法； 挑针疗法； 挑治
V006-N01041.englishNames: pricking method; Picking Therapy; fibrous tissue-pricking therapy
V006-N01041.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N01079.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01079.label: 激光针疗法
V006-N01079.path: 疗法类术语｜针灸疗法｜其他针灸疗法
V006-N01079.definition: 运用医用激光仪所输出的激光束替代毫针刺激相关经络腧穴，以治疗相关疾病的一种针灸疗法。

V006-N01079.label: 激光针疗法
V006-N01079.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N00929.label: 隔蒜灸疗法
V006-N00929.englishNames: moxibustion on garlic therapy; Garlic Partitioned Moxibustion Therapy
V006-N00929.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N00929.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00929.label: 隔蒜灸
V006-N00929.englishNames: moxibustion on garlic; garlic interposed moxibustion; Garlic-insulated moxibustion
V006-N00929.pinyinNames: ge suan jiu; gé suàn jiǔ
V006-N00929.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00929.definition: A method to place a fresh garlic slice or mashed garlic between the moxa cone and the skin.

V006-N01092.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01092.label: 头针疗法
V006-N01092.path: 疗法类术语｜针灸疗法｜针刺疗法
V006-N01092.definition: 根据大脑皮层功能定位理论，将头皮划分出皮层功能相对应的刺激区，在有关刺激区进行持续、快速捻针等手法以治疗各种疾病的一种针刺疗法。

V006-N01092.label: 头针疗法
V006-N01092.aliases: 头皮针； 头针； Scalp Acupuncture
V006-N01092.englishNames: Scalp Acupuncture Therapy; scalp acupuncture therapy
V006-N01092.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N01092.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01092.label: 头针疗法
V006-N01092.aliases: 头皮针、颅针疗法； 头皮针疗法
V006-N01092.pinyinNames: tou zhen liao fa; tóu zhēn liáo fǎ
V006-N01092.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01092.definition: A therapeutic method to stimulate specific lines on the scalp with an acupuncture needle.

V006-N01113.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01113.label: 足针疗法
V006-N01113.path: 疗法类术语｜针灸疗法｜针刺疗法
V006-N01113.definition: 针刺足部特定穴位，以治疗相应疾病的一种针刺疗法。

V006-N01113.label: 足针疗法
V006-N01113.englishNames: Foot Acupuncture Therapy; foot acupuncture therapy
V006-N01113.path: 治法｜疗法类术语｜针灸疗法

V006-N01142.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01142.label: 从阳引阴
V006-N01142.definition: 根据阴阳互根原理，在补阴时适当配用补阳之品，以助阴气生成的方法。

V006-N01142.label: 从阳引阴
V006-N01142.definition: 病在阴而治其阳。与“阴病治阳”义近。针法原则。从阳分引出阴分的邪气或正气。病在阴经而选取阳经穴位治之。

V006-N01142.label: 从阳引阴
V006-N01142.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜调理阴阳

V006-N01142.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01142.label: 从阳引阴
V006-N01142.aliases: 阳中求阴； 病在阳而治其阴
V006-N01142.englishNames: Seeking yin from yang; treating yang for yin disorder; treating yin for yang disorder; seeking yin from yang
V006-N01142.pinyinNames: cóng yáng yǐn yīn; cong yang yin yin
V006-N01142.definition: This is originally a needling method to puncture yang meridians for problems of yin meridians. Later, this method has been developed into a principle based on interdependence between yin and yang: to add some yang-reinforcing medicines to yin-nourishing formulas to assist the generation of yin qi.

V006-N01143.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01143.label: 从阴引阳
V006-N01143.definition: 根据阴阳互根原理,在补阳时须适当配用补阴之品,以助阳气生化的方法。

V006-N01143.label: 从阴引阳
V006-N01143.definition: 病在阳而治其阴。与“阳病治阴”义近。针法原则。从阴分引出阳分的邪气或正气。病在阳经而选取阴经穴位治之。

V006-N01143.label: 从阴引阳
V006-N01143.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜调理阴阳

V006-N01143.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01143.label: 从阴引阳
V006-N01143.aliases: 病在阳而治其阴； 阴中求阳
V006-N01143.englishNames: treating yin for yang disorder; treating yang for yin disorder; Seeking yang from yin; seeking yang from yin
V006-N01143.pinyinNames: cong yin yin yang; cóng yīn yǐn yáng
V006-N01143.definition: This is originally a needling method to puncture yin meridians for problems of yang meridians. Later, this method has been developed into a treatment principle based on interdependence between yin and yang: to add some yin-nourishing medicines to yang-reinforcing formulas to assist the transformation of yang qi.

V006-N01132.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01132.label: 扶正祛邪
V006-N01132.englishNames: reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factors
V006-N01132.definition: 对于正气虚弱而病邪不能外达，或因虚致实等病证，采用扶助正气为主，辅之以祛邪的方法，以促使正胜邪退的治疗原则。

V006-N01132.label: 扶正祛邪
V006-N01132.englishNames: strengthening healthy qi and eliminating pathogen

V006-N01132.label: 扶正祛邪
V006-N01132.englishNames: strengthening vital qi to eliminate pathogenic factor
V006-N01132.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V006-N01132.definition: 对于正虚为主、因虚致实的病证，应采取扶助正气为主，使正气加强，从而达到驱除病邪目的的治疗原则。

V006-N01132.label: 扶正祛邪
V006-N01132.englishNames: strengthening vital qi to eliminate pathogenic factor; reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factors

V006-N01132.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01132.label: 扶正祛邪
V006-N01132.aliases: 扶正达邪； Strength Resist Elimin Pathog
V006-N01132.englishNames: strengthening healthy qi and eliminating pathogen; Strengthening Body Resistance to Eliminate Pathogenic Factors; reinforcing the healthy qi to eliminate the pathogenic factors; Reinforce healthy qi to eliminate pathogenic factors; reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factors; reinforce the healthy qi and eliminate the pathogenic factors
V006-N01132.pinyinNames: fu zheng qu xie; fu zheng 祛xie; fú zhèng qū xié
V006-N01132.definition: A principle to reinforce anti-pathogenic qi to drive out the invading pathogenic factors. It is indicated for deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi coupled with exposure to pathogenic factors.

V006-N01132.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N01132.label: 扶正祛邪
V006-N01132.englishNames: strengthening healthy qi and eliminating pathogen; reinforce the healthy qi and eliminate the pathogenic factors; strengthening vital qi to eliminate pathogenic factor
V006-N01132.definition: two general principles of treatment — to reinforce the patient’s healthy qi and to eliminating the invading pathogenic factors, which can be applied separately or in combination according to the particular condition of the case

V006-N01148.label: 实者泻其子
V006-N01148.englishNames: purgingchild viscera for treating excess of mother viscera
V006-N01148.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V006-N01148.definition: 又称"实则泻其子”。根据五行相生和五脏母子关系的理论，对于五脏实证应采用攻泻“我生"之脏的方药进行治疗的原则。

V006-N01148.label: 实者泻其子
V006-N01148.englishNames: purging child viscera for treating excess of mother viscera; purging the child-organ in dealing with excess syndrome/patterns

V006-N01148.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01148.label: 实者泻其子
V006-N01148.englishNames: reducing chuild-element in excess condition; Reduce the son (element) for excess pattern; purging the child-organ for excess syndrome/patterns
V006-N01148.definition: A principle to treat excess of zang–fu organs based on the five-element theory. For example, since (heart) fire promotes (spleen earth), hyperactivity of heart fire can be treated by reducing the spleen and stomach.

V006-N01135.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01135.label: 虚则补之
V006-N01135.definition: 对于虚弱病证，使用补益的方药或相关疗法进行治疗的方法。

V006-N01135.label: 虚者补之
V006-N01135.definition: 用补益方药或具有补益功效的措施治疗虚性病证的原则。

V006-N01135.label: 虚者补之
V006-N01135.englishNames: treating deficiency syndrome with tonifying methods
V006-N01135.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V006-N01135.definition: 又称“虚则补之”。针对虚弱性的病证采用补益方药进行治疗的原则。

V006-N01135.label: 虚则补之
V006-N01135.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜正治法

V006-N01135.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01135.label: 虚则补之
V006-N01135.englishNames: treat deficiency by tonification; Treat deficiency with reinforcement; Treating Deficiency by Tonifying; treating deficiency with reinforcement; treating deficiency with tonification
V006-N01135.pinyinNames: xū zé bǔ zhī; xu ze bu zhi
V006-N01135.definition: A principle to treat deficiency conditions with tonic medicines or formulas.

V006-N01135.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N01135.label: 虚则补之
V006-N01135.definition: treat deficiency conditions by supplementation or tonification

V006-N01149.label: 虚者补其母
V006-N01149.definition: 根据五行相生和五脏母子关系理论，五脏虚证补其属母(生我)之脏以治。

V006-N01149.label: 虚者补其母
V006-N01149.englishNames: reinforcing mother viscera for treating deficiency of child viscera
V006-N01149.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V006-N01149.definition: 又称"虚则补其母”。根据五行相生和五脏母子关系的理论，对于五脏虚证应采用补益“生我"之脏的方药进行治疗的原则。

V006-N01149.label: 虚者补其母
V006-N01149.englishNames: nourishing the mother-organ in dealing with deficiency syndrome/patterns; reinforcing mother viscera for treating deficiency of child viscera

V006-N01149.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01149.label: 虚者补其母
V006-N01149.englishNames: Reinforce the mother (element) for deficiency pattern; reinforcing mother-element in deficiency condition; nourishing the mother-organ in dealing for deficiency syndrome/patterns
V006-N01149.definition: A principle to treat deficiency of zang–fu organs based on the five-element theory. For example, since (spleen) earth promotes (lung) metal, lung deficiency can be treated by reinforcing the spleen and stomach.

V006-N00704.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N00704.label: 针刺疗法
V006-N00704.definition: 泛指运用特制的针具或器械,配合针刺手法以刺激腧穴，获得疏通经络,调理气血阴阳、脏腑功能等效应，以防治各种疾病的一类针灸疗法。

V006-N01111.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01111.label: 腹针疗法
V006-N01111.path: 疗法类术语｜针灸疗法｜针刺疗法
V006-N01111.definition: 针刺腹部特定穴位，以治疗各种疾病的一种针刺疗法。

V006-N01111.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01111.label: 腹针疗法
V006-N01111.englishNames: abdomen needle therapy; abdominal acupuncture therapy; Abdominal acupuncture
V006-N01111.pinyinNames: fu zhen liao fa; fù zhēn liáo fǎ
V006-N01111.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01111.definition: A therapeutic method to stimulate specific abdominal points with an acupuncture needle.

V006-N01000.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01000.label: 针罐疗法
V006-N01000.path: 疗法类术语｜针灸疗法｜其他针灸疗法
V006-N01000.definition: 通过针刺留针得气，或出针后,再在针刺部位进行拔罐,将针刺和拔罐相结合以治疗相应疾病的一种针灸疗法。

V006-N01000.label: 针罐法
V006-N01000.englishNames: needling associated with cupping;needling combained with cupping
V006-N01000.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01000.definition: 留针后再在针刺部位拔罐的方法。

V006-N01064.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V006-N01064.label: 铍针疗法
V006-N01064.path: 疗法类术语｜外治疗法｜针刀疗法
V006-N01064.definition: 采用前端扁平斜刃、刀口线为0.5 mm～0.75 mm 的微细针刀具,通过一点式、多点式、线式等松解手法,对由皮神经卡压所致周围软组织高张力状态进行减张减压,以治疗相关疾病的一种针刀疗法。

V006-N00663.label: 心
V006-N00663.definition: 属五脏。居胸腔之内，膈膜之上，心包卫护其外。主神明、血脉，为五脏六腑之大主。

V006-N00663.label: 心
V006-N00663.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V006-N00663.definition: 五脏之一，位居胸腔之内，膈之上，有心包卫护于外,其主要生理功能是主血脉、主神志，并与舌和汗液密切相关。

V006-N00663.label: 心
V006-N00663.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜耳穴名称和头皮穴线名称
V006-N00663.definition: 耳穴。在耳甲腔正中凹陷处。

V006-N00665.label: 肺
V006-N00665.definition: 属五脏。主气，司呼吸，主一身之气，通调水道，宣发肃降，朝百脉，主治节。

V006-N00665.label: 肺
V006-N00665.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V006-N00665.definition: 五脏之一，位于胸腔之内，膈之上,左右各一。其主要生理功能是主气、司呼吸、主宣发肃降、通调水道、朝百脉而主治节，并与鼻窍、皮肤密切相关。

V006-N00665.label: 肺
V006-N00665.definition: a pair of organs located in the thoracic cavity above the diaphragm, which control respiration, dominate qi, govern diffusion and depurative downbearing, regulate the waterways, and are closely related to the function of the nose and skin surface

V006-N00662.label: 脾
V006-N00662.definition: 属五脏。主运化，升清，统血，为后天之本，气血生化之源。

V006-N00662.label: 脾
V006-N00662.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V006-N00662.definition: 五脏之一，位于中焦，膈之下。其主要生理功能是主运化，主升清，主统血，并与四肢、肌肉密切相关。

V006-N00662.label: 脾
V006-N00662.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜耳穴名称和头皮穴线名称
V006-N00662.definition: 耳穴。在 BD线下方,耳甲腔的后上部。

V006-N00662.definition: 該字未見於字書，疑指臀部。

V006-N00662.label: 脾

V006-N00662.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00662.label: 脾

V006-N00662.label: 脾
V006-N00662.definition: the organ located in the middle energizer below the diaphragm, whose main function is to transport and transform food, upbear the clear substances, keep the blood flowing within the vessels, and is closely related to the limbs and flesh

V006-N00660.label: 肝
V006-N00660.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V006-N00660.definition: 五脏之一，位于腹部,膈之下,右胁之内。其主要生理功能是主疏泄和主藏血,并与筋、目密切相关。

V006-N00660.label: 肝
V006-N00660.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜耳穴名称和头皮穴线名称
V006-N00660.definition: 耳穴。在耳甲艇的后下部。

V006-N00660.definition: the organ located in the right hypochondrium below the diaphragm, which stores blood, facilitates the coursing of qi, and is closely related to the function of the sinews and eyes

V006-N00657.label: 肾
V006-N00657.definition: 属五脏。主藏精、纳气和水液，为先天之本。

V006-N00657.label: 肾
V006-N00657.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V006-N00657.definition: 五脏之一，位于腰部,脊柱两旁,左右各一。其主要生理功能是藏精、主生长发育和生殖、主水和主纳气,并与骨、髓、耳密切相关。

V006-N00657.label: 肾
V006-N00657.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜耳穴名称和头皮穴线名称
V006-N00657.definition: 耳穴。在对耳轮下脚下方后部。

V006-N00657.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00657.label: 肾

V006-N00657.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00657.label: 肾
V006-N00657.definition: a pair of organs located in the lumbar region, which store vital essence, promote growth, development, reproduction, and urinary function, and also have a direct effect on the condition of the bone and marrow, activities of the brain, hearing and insp

V006-N00650.label: 胃
V006-N00650.definition: 属六腑。上口为贲门，下口为幽门。受纳和腐熟水谷。

V006-N00650.label: 胃
V006-N00650.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V006-N00650.definition: 六腑之一。位于中焦,其上口为贲门，下口为幽门。其主要生理功能是受纳与腐熟饮食物。

V006-N00650.label: 胃

V006-N00127.label: 太仓
V006-N00127.definition: 胃具有受纳水谷的功能。

V006-N00127.label: 水谷之海
V006-N00127.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V006-N00127.definition: 胃的别称。水谷是水液和谷物等饮食的统称。胃是饮食物汇集并进行腐熟、消化之处，犹如百川汇聚入海。

V006-N00127.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V006-N00127.definition: The stomach is known as “the sea of water and food”.

V006-N00652.label: 小肠
V006-N00652.definition: 属六腑。受盛化物，泌别清浊。

V006-N00652.label: 小肠

V006-N00652.definition: 六腑之一。小肠居腹中，上口在幽门处与胃相连，下口在阑门处与大肠相连。其主要生理功能是受盛、化物和泌别清浊。

V006-N00653.label: 大肠
V006-N00653.definition: 属六腑。传导糟粕，吸收水分。

V006-N00653.label: 大肠
V006-N00653.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V006-N00653.definition: 六腑之一，位于腹中，其上口通过阑门与小肠相接;其下端出口为肛门。其主要功能是接纳传导经小肠消化吸收后的食物糟粕与水液，并吸收其中的水津,经过燥化，形成粪便，经肛门排出体外。

V006-N00012.definition: 研究人体经络系统的循行分布、生理功能、病机变化及其与脏腑相互关系的理论。

V006-N00014.label: 经脉
V006-N00014.aliases: 解脉； 经隧； 人经
V006-N00014.definition: the main pathways of qi and blood coursing vertically, composed of the twelve regular meridians and the eight extra meridians, the same as channel vessel

V006-N00067.label: 络脉
V006-N00067.definition: 从经脉中分出而遍布全身的细小分支。包括十五络脉、浮络和孙络等。

V006-N00067.label: 络脉
V006-N00067.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00067.definition: 从经脉分出,遍布于全身的分支脉络,具有加强表里经脉的联系，通达经脉未能经过的部位等功能。有别络、浮络和孙络之分。

V006-N00067.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00067.label: 络脉
V006-N00067.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00067.definition: Collaterals are branches of meridians, including minute collaterals, blood collaterals and superficial collaterals.

V006-N00067.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00067.label: 络脉

V006-N00067.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00067.label: 络脉
V006-N00067.definition: the small branches of the meridians, serving as a network linking the various aspects of the body

V006-N00016.label: 十四经
V006-N00016.definition: 十二经脉与任脉、督脉的合称。

V006-N00016.label: 十四经
V006-N00016.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00016.definition: 十二经脉和任脉、督脉的合称。

V006-N00016.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00016.label: 十四经
V006-N00016.englishNames: fourteen meridians; fourteen meridians/channels; fourteen channels

V006-N00016.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00016.label: 十四经
V006-N00016.definition: a collective term for the twelve regular meridians plus the governor and conception vessels

V006-N00022.label: 经气
V006-N00022.definition: 运行于经脉中之气。由先后天的精气化生而成。

V006-N00022.label: 经气
V006-N00022.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00022.definition: 又称"经络之气”。即运行于经络中的气，不但指经脉的运行功能和经脉中的营养物质，而且是整体生命功能的表现。

V006-N00022.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00022.label: 经气
V006-N00022.path: 中医基础理论术语｜精气血津液类
V006-N00022.definition: The qi circulates within the meridians and falls under the category of healthy qi.

V006-N00022.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00022.label: 经气
V006-N00022.aliases: 脉气； 经络之气； Meridian Qi
V006-N00022.englishNames: meridian qi; Channel Qi; meridian/channel qi; channel qi

V006-N00022.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00022.label: 经气
V006-N00022.path: 基础理论｜精, 神, 氣, 血,
V006-N00022.definition: the qi that flows through the meridians, the same as collateral qi

V006-N00015.label: 经隧
V006-N00015.definition: 潜布于体表之下运行气血的经络通路。

V006-N00015.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00015.label: 经脉
V006-N00015.aliases: 解脉； 经隧； 人经
V006-N00015.definition: the main pathways of qi and blood coursing vertically, composed of the twelve regular meridians and the eight extra meridians, the same as channel vessel

V006-N00120.label: 根结
V006-N00120.definition: 经气的所起与所归。根，根本、开始，经气根于四肢末端的井穴；结，结聚、归结，即头、胸、腹部。

V006-N00120.label: 根结
V006-N00120.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00120.definition: “根"是经气始生的腧穴或部位;“结"是经气归结的腧穴或部位。

V006-N00120.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00120.label: 根结
V006-N00120.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00120.definition: The word “Gen” literally means root. It shares the similar meaning with “Ben”. The word “Jie” literally means knot. It shares the similar meaning with “Biao” (see Biao and Ben).

V006-N00120.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00120.label: 根结
V006-N00120.englishNames: starting and terminal points of meridian; Root and Knot; starting and terminal point of meridians/channels; root and knot

V006-N00122.label: 气街
V006-N00122.definition: 经气聚集通行的道路。包括头、胸、腹、胫。

V006-N00122.label: 气街
V006-N00122.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络

V006-N00122.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00122.label: 气街
V006-N00122.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00122.definition: Qi streets are the pathways for meridian qi to flow over the head and body trunk. There is a total of four qi streets, respectively on the head, chest, abdomen and lower leg.

V006-N00122.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00122.label: 气街
V006-N00122.englishNames: qi pathway; Pathway of Qi; another name forQichong(ST30）; pathway of qi

V006-N00123.label: 四海
V006-N00123.definition: 髓海、血海、气海、水谷之海的总称。脑为髓海，冲脉为血海，膻中为气海，胃为水谷之海。

V006-N00123.label: 四海
V006-N00123.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00123.definition: “海"为汇聚之处。四海是髓海、血海、气海、水谷之海的合称。脑为髓海，冲脉为血海，膻中为气海，胃为水谷之海。

V006-N00123.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00123.label: 四海
V006-N00123.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00123.definition: The four seas include the sea of marrow, sea of qi, sea of water and food, and sea of blood (sea of the twelve meridians).

V006-N00123.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00123.label: 四海

V006-N01202.label: 经络现象
V006-N01202.definition: 沿经络循行路线显现出的各种生理、病理征象。

V006-N01202.label: 经络现象
V006-N01202.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N01202.definition: 在某些条件下，沿经脉循行路线呈现的感觉异常、形态异常或物理、化学指标的相对特异性变化等现象。

V006-N01202.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01202.label: 经络现象
V006-N01202.englishNames: meridian phenomenon; channel phenomenon; me ridian phenomenon; The meridian phenomena
V006-N01202.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01202.definition: Specific disturbance of sensation, transmission of sensation and visible changes in skin colour and quality along the pathways of meridians.

V006-N01202.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01202.label: 经络现象

V006-N01203.label: 循经感传
V006-N01203.definition: 刺激人体穴位而产生的酸、麻、胀、重等感觉沿经络循行路线传导的现象。

V006-N01203.label: 循经感传
V006-N01203.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N01203.definition: 经穴受到刺激，沿着经络循行路线产生酸、麻、胀、热等感觉的传导现象。

V006-N01203.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01203.label: 循经感传
V006-N01203.englishNames: Transmission of sensation along meridians; propagated sensation along channel; transmission of sensation along meridian
V006-N01203.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01203.definition: Sensations radiating along the pathways of meridians.

V006-N01203.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01203.label: 循经感传
V006-N01203.englishNames: sensation transmission along meridians; sensation transmission along meridian/channel

V006-N00028.label: 十二经脉
V006-N00028.definition: 手三阴经、手三阳经、足三阳经、足三阴经的总称。

V006-N00028.label: 十二经脉
V006-N00028.englishNames: twelve regular channels; twelve regular meridians
V006-N00028.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00028.definition: 又称“十二正经”。为手三阳经、手三阴经、足三阳经、足三阴经的合称，为经络系统的主体。

V006-N00028.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00028.label: 十二经脉
V006-N00028.aliases: 十二正经； Twelve regular meridians
V006-N00028.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00028.definition: The twelve meridians (i.e. the twelve regular meridians) are: the lung meridian; the large intestine meridian; the stomach meridian; the spleen meridian; the heart meridian; the small intestine meridian; the bladder meridian; the kidney meridian; the pericardium meridian; the Sanjiao meridian; the gallbladder meridian; and the liver meridian.

V006-N00028.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00028.label: 十二经脉
V006-N00028.englishNames: twelve meridians; twelve meridians/channels; twelve regular channels; twelve regular meridians

V006-N00028.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00028.label: 十二经
V006-N00028.aliases: 十二正经； 十二经脉
V006-N00028.definition: a collective term for the three yin meridians and three yang meridians of each hand and foot, also the same as twelve regular meridians

V006-N00029.label: 手三阴经
V006-N00029.definition: 手太阴肺经、手少阴心经和手厥阴心包经的总称。其循行方向均由胸部内脏经上肢屈侧走向手部。

V006-N00029.label: 手三阴经
V006-N00029.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00029.definition: hand;three yin meridians of hand手太阴肺经、手少阴心经和手厥阴心包经的合称。

V006-N00029.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00029.label: 手三阴经
V006-N00029.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00029.definition: The three hand-yin meridians are lung meridian, heart meridian and pericardium meridian.

V006-N00029.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00029.label: 手三阴经
V006-N00029.englishNames: three yin meridians of hand; three yin meridians/channels of hand

V006-N00030.label: 手太阴肺经
V006-N00030.englishNames: lung meridian of hand taiy in
V006-N00030.path: 经络类｜十二经脉｜手三阴经
V006-N00030.definition: 属十二经脉。起于中焦，属于肺脏，联络大肠。止于拇指桡侧端。

V006-N00030.label: 手太阴肺经
V006-N00030.englishNames: Taiyin Lung Channel of Hand;Taiyin Lung Meridian of Hand
V006-N00030.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00030.definition: 本经起于中焦,向下络大肠，回过来沿着胃上口穿过膈肌,入属肺，从肺系横行出于胸壁外上方,出腋下,沿上肢内侧前缘下行,过肘窝入寸口上鱼际,直出拇指桡侧端少商穴。其分支从前臂列缺穴处分出，沿掌背侧走向食指桡侧端,经气于商阳穴与手阳明大肠经相接。

V006-N00030.label: 手太阴肺经
V006-N00030.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V006-N00030.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00030.label: 手太阴肺经
V006-N00030.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00030.definition: The lung meridian pertains to the lung and connects with the large intestine. It mainly travels along the anterior border of the medial aspect of the arm.

V006-N00030.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00030.label: 手太阴肺经
V006-N00030.englishNames: lung meridian of hand taiyin; lung meridian/channel of hand greater yin(LU); Taiyin Lung Channel of Hand; Taiyin Lung Meridian of Hand

V006-N00030.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00030.label: 手太阴肺经
V006-N00030.englishNames: lung meridian (LU); hand great yin lung meridian; channel LU

V006-N00030.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00030.label: 手太阴肺经
V006-N00030.englishNames: lung meridian (LU); hand great yin lung meridian; channel LU
V006-N00030.definition: one of the regular twelve meridians which begins internally in the middle energizer, descends to connect with the large intestine, then ascends to the lung and throat, courses laterally and exits superficially at zhongfu (LU1), and then descends along

V006-N00032.label: 手厥阴心包经
V006-N00032.englishNames: pericardium meridian of hand jue yin
V006-N00032.path: 经络类｜十二经脉｜手三阴经
V006-N00032.definition: 属十二经脉。起于胸中，属心包络，联络三焦。止于中指末端。

V006-N00032.label: 手厥阴心包经
V006-N00032.englishNames: Jueyin Pericardium Channel of Hand;Jueyin Pericardium Meridian of Hand
V006-N00032.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00032.definition: 本经起于胸中,出属心包络,向下穿过膈肌,络于上、中、下三焦。其分支从胸中分出，出胁部当腋下3寸处天池穴，向上至腋窝下，沿上肢内侧中线入肘,过腕部,人掌中，沿中指桡侧至末端中冲穴。另一分支从掌中分出，沿无名指尺侧端行，经气于关冲穴与手少阳三焦经相接。

V006-N00032.label: 手厥阴心包经
V006-N00032.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V006-N00032.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00032.label: 手厥阴心包经
V006-N00032.pinyinNames: shǒu jué yīn xīn bāo jīng
V006-N00032.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00032.definition: The pericardium meridian pertains to the pericardium and connects with the Sanjiao. It mainly travels along the palmar aspect of the upper arm and moves towards the forearm running between the tendons of the m. palmaris longus and m. flexor carpi radialis.

V006-N00032.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00032.label: 手厥阴心包经
V006-N00032.englishNames: pericardium meridian of hand jueyin; pericardiummeridian/channel of hand reverting yin(PC)
V006-N00032.pinyinNames: shou jue yin xin bao jing

V006-N00032.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00032.label: 手厥阴心包经
V006-N00032.englishNames: pericardium meridian (PC); hand reverting yin pericardium meridian; channel $ PC
V006-N00032.pinyinNames: shou jue yin xin bao jing

V006-N00032.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00032.label: 手厥阴心包经
V006-N00032.aliases: 手厥阴； 手厥阴心包络经； 手心主； 心包经； 心包络经； 心主； 心主手厥阴心包络经； 心主手厥阴心包络之脉
V006-N00032.englishNames: pericardium meridian (PC); Pericadium Channel of Hand-Jueyin; the Pericardium Meridian of Hand-Jueyin
V006-N00032.pinyinNames: shou jue yin xin bao jing
V006-N00032.definition: one of the twelve regular meridians which originates in the center of the thorax, connects with the pericardium, and descends to the lower abdomen, linking all the three energizers. The thoracic branch exits superficially at tianchi (PC1) near the nip

V006-N00031.label: 手少阴心经
V006-N00031.englishNames: heart meridian of hand shao yin
V006-N00031.path: 经络类｜十二经脉｜手三阴经
V006-N00031.definition: 属十二经脉。起于心中，属于心系，联络小肠。止于小指桡侧端。

V006-N00031.label: 手少阴心经
V006-N00031.englishNames: Shaoyin Heart Channel of Hand;Shaoyin Heart Meridian of Hand
V006-N00031.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00031.definition: 本经起于心中，出属心系，内行主干向下穿过膈肌,联络小肠;外行主干,从心系上肺，斜出腋下,沿上臂内侧后缘，过肘中,经掌后锐骨端,进入掌中,沿小指桡侧至末端，经气于少冲穴处与手太阳小肠经相接。支脉从心系向上，挟着咽喉两旁,连系于目系，即眼球内连于脑的脉络。

V006-N00031.label: 手少阴心经
V006-N00031.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V006-N00031.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00031.label: 手少阴心经
V006-N00031.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00031.definition: The heart meridian pertains to the heart and connects with the small intestine. It mainly travels along the posterior border of the ulnar palmar aspect of the arm.

V006-N00031.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00031.label: 手少阴心经
V006-N00031.englishNames: heart meridian of hand shaoyin; heart meridian/channel of hand lesser yin(HT); Shaoyin Heart Channel of Hand; Shaoyin Heart Meridian of Hand

V006-N00031.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00031.label: 手少阴心经
V006-N00031.englishNames: heart meridian (HT); hand lesser yin heart meridian; channel $ HT

V006-N00031.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00031.label: 手少阴心经
V006-N00031.englishNames: heart meridian (HT); hand lesser yin heart meridian; channel $ HT
V006-N00031.definition: one of the twelve regular meridians which originates in the heart, descends internally past the diaphragm and connects with the small intestine. The cardiac branch ascends internally paralateral to the esophagus and terminates at the eye. The main bra

V006-N00033.label: 手三阳经
V006-N00033.definition: 手阳明大肠经、手太阳小肠经和手少阳三焦经的合称。其循行方向均由手部经上肢伸侧走向头部。

V006-N00033.label: 手三阳经
V006-N00033.englishNames: three yangchannels of hand;three yang meridians of hand
V006-N00033.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00033.definition: 手阳明大肠经、手太阳小肠经和手少阳三焦经的合称。

V006-N00033.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00033.label: 手三阳经
V006-N00033.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00033.definition: The three hand-yang meridians are large intestine meridian, small intestine meridian and Sanjiao meridian.

V006-N00033.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00033.label: 手三阳经
V006-N00033.englishNames: three yang meridians of hand; three yang meridians/channels of hand; three yang channels of hand

V006-N00033.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V006-N00034.definition: 属十二经脉。起于食指桡侧端，属于大肠，联络肺脏。止于鼻孔两侧。

V006-N00034.label: 手阳明大肠经
V006-N00034.englishNames: Yangming Large Intestine Channel of Hand;Yangming Large Intestine Meridian of Hand
V006-N00034.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00034.definition: 本经起于食指桡侧端(商阳穴),经过手背行于上肢伸侧前缘，上肩，至肩关节前缘，向后与督脉在大椎穴处相会，再向前下行入锁骨上窝(缺盆)，进入胸腔络肺，通过膈肌下行，入属大肠。其分支从锁骨上窝上行,经颈部至面颊,入下齿中，回出夹口两旁，左右交叉于人中,至对侧鼻翼旁，经气于迎香穴处与足阳明胃经相接。

V006-N00034.label: 手阳明大肠经
V006-N00034.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V006-N00034.definition: The large intestine meridian pertains to the large intestine and connects with the lung. It mainly travels along the anterior border of the radial aspect of the arm, passes through the cheeks, enters the lower teeth, and then over the upper lip and terminates beside the opposite nostril.

V006-N00036.definition: 属十二经脉。起于无名指尺侧端，属于三焦，络于心包。止于目外眦。

V006-N00036.label: 手少阳三焦经
V006-N00036.englishNames: Shaoyang Sanjiao Channel of Hand;Shaoyang Sanjiao Meridianof Hand
V006-N00036.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00036.definition: 本经起于无名指尺侧端关冲穴，向上沿无名指尺侧至手腕背面，上行尺骨、桡骨之间，通过肘尖,沿上臂外侧向上至肩部,向前行入缺盆,布于膻中,散络心包,穿过膈肌,属上、中、下三焦。其分支从膻中分出，上行出缺盆,至肩部,左右交会并与督脉相会于大椎，上行到项,沿耳后直上出耳上角,然后屈曲向下经面颊部至目眶下。其另一分支从耳后分出，进入耳中，出走耳前，至目外毗，经气于瞳子膠穴与足少阳胆经相接。

V006-N00036.label: 手少阳三焦经

V006-N00036.definition: The Sanjiao meridian pertains to Sanjiao and connects with the pericardium. It is mainly distributed along the dorsal aspect of the forearm between the radius and ulna and reaches the ears and face.

V006-N00035.englishNames: small intestine meridian of hand tai yang

V006-N00035.englishNames: Taiyang Small Intestine Channel of Hand;Taiyang Small Intestine Meridian of Hand
V006-N00035.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00035.definition: 本经起于手小指尺侧端少泽穴,沿手背、上肢外侧后缘，过肘部，到肩关节后面，绕肩胛部,左右交会并与督脉在大椎穴处相会，前行入缺盆，深入体腔，络心，沿食道，穿过膈肌,到达胃部，下行,属小肠。其分支从面颊部分出,向上行于眼下，至目内毗，经气于睛明穴与足太阳膀胱经相接。

V006-N00038.definition: 属十二经脉。起于鼻翼两侧，属于胃，联络脾脏。止于中趾外侧。

V006-N00038.label: 足阳明胃经
V006-N00038.englishNames: Yangming Stomach Channel of Foot;Yangming Stomach Meridian of Foot
V006-N00038.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00038.definition: 本经起于鼻翼两旁迎香穴，夹鼻上行，至鼻根部，与足太阳膀胱经相交于目内，向下沿鼻柱外侧，入上齿中，还出，环绕嘴唇，在颏唇沟承浆穴处左右相交，退回沿下颌骨后下缘经下颌角上行过耳前，沿发际，到额前神庭穴。其下行支脉沿喉咙向下后行，左右交会并与督脉在大椎穴处相会，折向前行，入缺盆，深入体腔，下行穿过膈肌，属胃，络脾。其直行主干从缺盆出体表，沿乳中线下行，夹脐两旁旁开2寸，下行至腹股沟处的气街穴，沿大腿前侧，至膝膑，沿下肢胫骨前缘下行至足背，入足第二趾外侧端厉兑穴。另一分支从足背上冲阳穴分出，前行入足大趾内侧端，经气于隐白穴与足太阴脾经相接。

V006-N00038.label: 足阳明胃经
V006-N00038.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V006-N00038.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00038.label: 足阳明胃经
V006-N00038.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00038.definition: The stomach meridian pertains to the stomach and connects with the spleen. It starts directly below the pupil between the eyeball and the infraorbital ridge. Running downward along the lateral side of the nose, to the lateral corner of the mouth. Curving posterior to the anterior angle of the mandible. Then it travels to the posterior aspect of the mandible ascending in front of the ear and following the anterior hairline, it reaches the forehead. It then runs along the throat and enters the supraclavicular fossa. The straight line of the meridian separates the supraclavicular fossa and runs downward along the middle mammillary line. It travels to the side of the umbilicus and descends to the inguinal groove. Running downward it travels along the anterior aspect of the thigh and reaches the knee. From there is continues further down along the anterior border of the lateral aspect of the tibia to the dorsum of the foot and reaches the lateral side of the tip of the second toe.

V006-N00040.label: 足少阳胆经
V006-N00040.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00040.definition: Channel of Foot；Shaoyang Gallbladder Meridian of Foot本经起于目外毗瞳子膠穴，上至头角，再向下到耳后，再折向上行,经额部至眉上，又向后折至枕部，沿颈下行至肩上，左右交会并与督脉相会于大椎穴，前行人缺盆。其分支：从目外毗分出，下行至大迎穴，行至目眶下,分支经过下颌角部下行至颈部，入缺盆后，深入体腔，穿过膈肌,络肝,属胆,沿胁里浅出气街,绕毛际,横向至环跳穴处。直行主干从缺盆下行腋部，沿胸侧,过季肋，下行至环跳穴处与前脉会合，再向下沿大腿外侧、膝关节外缘，行于腓骨前面，直下至腓骨下端，浅出外踝之前，沿足背行出于足第四趾外侧端窍阴穴。其分支从足背分出，前行出足大趾外侧端，折回穿过爪甲,分布于足大趾爪甲后丛毛中，经气由此处与足厥阴肝经相接。

V006-N00040.label: 足少阳胆经
V006-N00040.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V006-N00040.definition: The gallbladder meridian pertains to the gallbladder and connects with the liver. It is mainly distributed over the head, sides of the head, chest, and abdomen and descends down to the lateral aspect of the leg.

V006-N00039.englishNames: Taiyang Bladder Channel of Foot;Taiyang Bladder Meridian of Foot
V006-N00039.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00039.definition: 本经起于目内毗睛明穴，向上至额部，左右交会并与督脉相会于头顶部百会穴。直行主干从头顶部分别向后行至枕骨处，进入颅腔,络脑，回出至后项部左右分开向下。一支沿肩胛内侧,脊柱两旁旁开1.5寸，到达腰部,进入脊柱两旁的肌肉，深入体腔，络肾，属膀胱。另一支经肩脾内侧,从附分穴挟脊旁开3寸下行至髀枢，经大腿后侧至腘窝中，然后下行穿过腓肠肌,出走于足外踝后,沿足背外侧缘至小趾外侧端，经气于至阴穴与足少阴肾经相接。

V006-N00039.definition: The bladder meridian pertains to the urinary bladder and connects with the kidney. It is mainly distributed over the head, back and along the back of the leg.

V006-N00041.label: 足三阴经
V006-N00041.definition: 足太阴脾经、足少阴肾经和足厥阴肝经的总称。其循行方向均由足部经下肢及腹部而抵达胸部。

V006-N00041.label: 足三阴经
V006-N00041.englishNames: three yin channels of foot; three yin meridians of foot
V006-N00041.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00041.definition: 足太阴脾经、足少阴肾经和足厥阴肝经的合称。

V006-N00041.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00041.label: 足三阴经
V006-N00041.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00041.definition: The three foot-yin meridians are spleen meridian, kidney meridian and liver meridian.

V006-N00041.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00041.label: 足三阴经
V006-N00041.englishNames: three yin meridians of foot; three yin meridians/channels of foot; three yin channels of foot

V006-N00041.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00041.label: 足三阴经
V006-N00041.englishNames: three yang meridians of the foot
V006-N00041.definition: the meridians/channels running from the head through the back downward to the feet, namely, the stomach meridian, the bladder meridian and the gallbladder meridian

V006-N00041.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00041.label: 足三阴经
V006-N00041.aliases: 足之六阴； Three Yin Channels of Foot
V006-N00041.englishNames: three yin meridians of the foot; Three Yin Meridians of Foot
V006-N00041.definition: the meridians/channels running through the medial side of the lower limbs from the feet to the abdomen and chest, namely, the spleen meridian, the kidney meridian and the liver meridian

V006-N00042.label: 足太阴脾经
V006-N00042.englishNames: spleen meridian of foot taiy in
V006-N00042.path: 经络类｜十二经脉｜足三阴经
V006-N00042.definition: 属十二经脉。起于足大趾内侧端，属于脾脏，联络于胃，止于舌根，散布舌下。

V006-N00042.label: 足太阴脾经
V006-N00042.englishNames: Taiyin Spleen Channel of Foot;Taiyin Spleen Meridian of Foot
V006-N00042.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00042.definition: 本经起于足大趾内侧端隐白穴，沿内侧赤白肉际上行,过内踝的前缘,沿小腿内侧正中线上行,在内踝上8寸处,交出足厥阴肝经之前，上行沿大腿内侧前缘,进入腹部，属脾,络胃。向上穿过膈肌,沿食道两旁，连舌本,散舌下。其分支从胃别出,上行通过膈肌,注入心中,经气于此与手少阴心经相接。

V006-N00042.label: 足太阴脾经
V006-N00042.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V006-N00042.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00042.label: 足太阴脾经
V006-N00042.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00042.definition: The spleen meridian pertains to the spleen and connects with the stomach. It mainly travels along the anterior border of the medial aspect of the leg and passes through the chest and abdomen.

V006-N00042.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00042.label: 足太阴脾经
V006-N00042.englishNames: spleen meridian of foot taiyin; spleen meridian/channel of foot greater yin(SP); Taiyin Spleen Channel of Foot; Taiyin Spleen Meridian of Foot

V006-N00042.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00042.label: 足太阴脾经
V006-N00042.englishNames: spleen meridian (SP); foot greater yin spleen meridian; channel$ SP

V006-N00042.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00042.label: 足太阴脾经
V006-N00042.englishNames: spleen meridian (SP); foot greater yin spleen meridian; channel$ SP
V006-N00042.definition: one of the twelve regular meridians which runs from yinbai (SP1) at the medial side of the great toe, ascends along the medial side of the foot and tibia and anteromedial side of the thigh to the lower abdomen. It then enters the abdomen and connects

V006-N00044.label: 足厥阴肝经
V006-N00044.englishNames: liver meridian of foot jue yin
V006-N00044.path: 经络类｜十二经脉｜足三阴经
V006-N00044.definition: 属十二经脉。起于足大趾背毫毛处，属于肝脏，络于胆，连目系，止于巅。

V006-N00044.label: 足厥阴肝经
V006-N00044.englishNames: Jueyin Liver Channel of Foot;Jueyin Liver Meridian of Foot
V006-N00044.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00044.definition: 本经起于足大趾爪甲后丛毛处，向上沿足背至内踝前1寸处，向上沿胫骨内缘，在内踝上8寸处交出足太阴脾经之后，上行过膝内侧，沿大腿内侧中线进入阴毛中，绕阴器，至小腹,夹胃两旁,属肝,络胆,向上穿过膈肌,分布于胁肋部。沿喉咙的后边，向上进入鼻咽部，上行连接目系，出于额，上行与督脉会于头顶部。其分支从肝分出，穿过膈肌，向上注入肺，经气由此处与手太阴肺经相接。

V006-N00044.label: 足厥阴肝经
V006-N00044.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V006-N00044.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00044.label: 足厥阴肝经
V006-N00044.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00044.definition: The liver meridian pertains to the liver and connects with the gallbladder. It mainly travels along the medial aspect of the leg, passes over the chest and abdomen, and its divergent meridian reaches the vertex.

V006-N00044.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00044.label: 足厥阴肝经
V006-N00044.englishNames: liver meridian of foot jueyin; liver meridian/channel of foot reverting yin(LR); Jueyin Liver Channel of Foot; Jueyin Liver Meridian of Foot

V006-N00044.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00044.label: 足厥阴肝经
V006-N00044.englishNames: liver meridian (LR); foot reverting yin liver meridian; channel $ LR

V006-N00044.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00044.label: 足厥阴肝经
V006-N00044.aliases: 肝经； 肝足厥阴之脉； 足厥阴
V006-N00044.englishNames: liver meridian (LR); Liver Meridian of Foot-Jueyin
V006-N00044.definition: one of the twelve regular meridians which runs from dadun (LR1) on the medial aspect of the big toe just behind the nail, through the inner side of the lower limb, external genitalia and abdomen, to qimen (LR14), a point about 2 cun below the nipple.

V006-N00043.label: 足少阴肾经
V006-N00043.englishNames: kidney meridian of foot shao yin
V006-N00043.path: 经络类｜十二经脉｜足三阴经
V006-N00043.definition: 属十二经脉。起于足小趾蹠侧，属于肾脏，联络膀胱。止于舌根两侧。

V006-N00043.label: 足少阴肾经
V006-N00043.englishNames: Shaoyin Kidney Channel of Foot;Shaoyin Kidney Meridian of Foot
V006-N00043.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00043.definition: 本经起于足小趾下,斜行于足心涌泉穴,出行于舟骨粗隆之下，沿内踝后,分出进入足跟,向上沿小腿内侧后缘,至腘内侧，上股内侧后缘入脊内,穿过脊柱,属肾,络膀胱。其直行主干从肾分出,上行,穿过肝和膈肌,进入肺,沿喉咙,到舌根两旁。其分支从肺中分出,络心，注于胸中,经气于此处与手厥阴心包经相接。

V006-N00043.label: 足少阴肾经
V006-N00043.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V006-N00043.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00043.label: 足少阴肾经
V006-N00043.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00043.definition: The kidney meridian pertains to the kidney and connects with the urinary bladder. It mainly travels along the posterior border of the medial aspect of the leg and passes through the chest and abdomen, finally terminating at the root of the tongue.

V006-N00043.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00043.label: 足少阴肾经
V006-N00043.englishNames: kidney meridian of foot shaoyin; kidney meridian/channel of foot lesser yin(KI)

V006-N00043.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00043.label: 足少阴肾经
V006-N00043.englishNames: kidney meridian (KI); foot lesser yin kidney meridian; channel $ KL

V006-N00043.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00043.label: 足少阴肾经
V006-N00043.englishNames: kidney meridian (KI); foot lesser yin kidney meridian; channel $ KL
V006-N00043.definition: one of the twelve regular meridians which begins on the plantar tip of the small toe and travels to yongquan (KI1) in the center of the sole, continues along the medial side of the lower limb to the symphysis pubis, turns internally to the kidney and

V006-N00054.label: 十二经别
V006-N00054.definition: 十二经脉别行而离入出合，深入体腔的支脉。

V006-N00054.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00054.label: 十二经别
V006-N00054.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00054.definition: The twelve divergent meridians branch out from the twelve regular meridians and are deeper in the body. They function to strengthen the connection between internally-externally coupled meridians.

V006-N00054.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00054.label: 十二经别
V006-N00054.englishNames: twelve divergent meridians; twelve meridian/channel divergences

V006-N00054.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00054.label: 十二经别
V006-N00054.englishNames: twelve meridian divergences; Branches of the Twelve Regular Channels; Collaterals of Twelve Meridians; the Branches of the Twelve Meridians; the Twelve Divergent Meridians; Twelve Meridian Divergences
V006-N00054.definition: the divergent passages of the twelve main meridians going deep in the body

V006-N00091.label: 十二经筋
V006-N00091.definition: 十二经脉之气濡养筋肉骨节的体系，附属于十二经的筋膜系统。

V006-N00091.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00091.label: 十二经筋
V006-N00091.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00091.definition: The twelve muscle regions are corresponding sites where the qi and blood of the twelve meridians to nourish the muscles and tendons. Their distributions are almost the same as that of the twelve meridians.

V006-N00091.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00091.label: 十二经筋
V006-N00091.englishNames: tendons along twelve meridians; twelve meridian/channel sinews

V006-N00091.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00091.label: 十二经筋
V006-N00091.englishNames: twelve meridian sinews; Twelve Meridian Sinews
V006-N00091.definition: the sinew systems attributed to the twelve meridians

V006-N00090.label: 十二经筋
V006-N00090.definition: 十二经脉之气濡养筋肉骨节的体系，附属于十二经的筋膜系统。

V006-N00090.label: 经筋
V006-N00090.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00090.definition: 附属十二经脉的筋膜系统,是十二经脉之气濡养筋肉骨节的体系,具有约束骨骼,屈伸关节的功能。

V006-N00090.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00090.label: 十二经筋
V006-N00090.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00090.definition: The twelve muscle regions are corresponding sites where the qi and blood of the twelve meridians to nourish the muscles and tendons. Their distributions are almost the same as that of the twelve meridians.

V006-N00090.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00090.label: 十二经筋
V006-N00090.englishNames: tendons along twelve meridians; twelve meridian/channel sinews

V006-N00090.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00090.label: 经筋

V006-N00090.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00090.label: 十二经筋
V006-N00090.englishNames: twelve meridian sinews; Twelve Meridian Sinews
V006-N00090.definition: the sinew systems attributed to the twelve meridians

V006-N00090.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00090.label: 经筋
V006-N00090.definition: the sinew system attributed to a certain meridian/ channel

V006-N00104.label: 十二皮部
V006-N00104.definition: 十二经脉功能活动反映于体表的部位。

V006-N00104.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00104.label: 十二皮部
V006-N00104.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00104.definition: The twelve cutaneous regions are corresponding sites where the qi and blood of the twelve meridians to nourish the skin. They are generally known as the outward manifestations of the twelve meridians and collaterals.

V006-N00104.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00104.label: 十二皮部
V006-N00104.englishNames: twelve skin regions; twelve cutaneous regions

V006-N00104.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00104.label: 十二皮部
V006-N00104.aliases: 六经皮部； 皮部； 皮有分部； Twelve Skin Areas
V006-N00104.englishNames: twelve cutaneous regions; Twelve Cutaneous Regions; Twelve Skin Areas
V006-N00104.definition: the regions of the skin reflecting the functional condition of the twelve meridians respectively

V006-N00045.label: 奇经八脉
V006-N00045.definition: 十二经脉以外别道奇行的经脉，包括督脉、任脉、冲脉、带脉、阴维脉、阳维脉、阴跷脉和阳跷脉。

V006-N00045.label: 奇经八脉
V006-N00045.englishNames: Eight Extraordinary Channels;Eight Extraordinary Meridians nels;Eight Extraordinary Meridians
V006-N00045.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00045.definition: 督脉、任脉、冲脉、带脉、阴维脉、阳维脉、阴晓脉、阳晓脉的合称。

V006-N00045.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00045.label: 奇经八脉
V006-N00045.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00045.definition: The eight extraordinary meridians are different from the twelve regular meridians with special distributions and functions. They are Du meridian, Ren meridian, Chong meridian, Dai meridian, Yinwei meridian, Yangwei meridian, Yinqiao meridian and Yangqiao meridian.

V006-N00045.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00045.label: 奇经八脉
V006-N00045.englishNames: eight extra meridians; eight extra meridians/channels; Eight Extraordinary Channels; Eight Extraordinary Meridians

V006-N00045.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00045.label: 奇经八脉
V006-N00045.englishNames: eight extra meridians; Eight Extra Meridians
V006-N00045.definition: a collective term for governor vessel, conception vessel, thoroughfare vessel, belt vessel, yin heel vessel, yang heel vessel, yin link vessel, and yang link vessel

V006-N00046.label: 督脉
V006-N00046.definition: 属奇经八脉。起于胞中，下出会阴，向后行于脊内，入脑，上巅顶，止于唇。

V006-N00046.label: 督脉
V006-N00046.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00046.definition: 起于胞中，下出会阴，沿脊柱里边直向上行，至项后风府穴处进入颅内，络脑，并由项沿头部正中线，上行颠顶，沿前额正中，鼻柱正中,至上唇系带处。

V006-N00046.label: 督脉
V006-N00046.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜生理
V006-N00046.definition: 起于胞中，上行人脑，并主一身之阳经，下出会阴，沿脊柱里边直向上行，至项后风府穴处进人颅内，络脑，并由项沿头部正中线，上行颠顶，沿前额正中，鼻柱正中，至上唇系带处。起于季胁，斜向下行到带脉穴，五枢穴、维道穴，约束冲任督三脉，横行腰腹，绕身一周。

V006-N00046.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00046.label: 督脉
V006-N00046.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00046.definition: The Du meridian is mainly distributed over the head, face and along the midline of the back.

V006-N00046.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00046.label: 阳脉之海
V006-N00046.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00046.definition: The Du meridian governs meridian qi of all yang meridians and is therefore known as “the sea of yang meridians”.

V006-N00046.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00046.label: 督脉
V006-N00046.englishNames: governor vessel; governor vessel(GV); Governor Channel; Governor Vessel

V006-N00046.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00046.label: 督脉

V006-N00046.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00046.label: 督脉
V006-N00046.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates in the lower abdomen and exits at changqiang (GV1), a point at the back of the anus, sending one branch forward to huiyin (CV1). The main portion of the meridian/channel ascends along the midline of th

V006-N00047.label: 任脉
V006-N00047.definition: 属奇经八脉。起于胞中，下出会阴，沿腹上达咽喉，环绕口唇。止于目下。

V006-N00047.label: 任脉
V006-N00047.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00047.definition: 起于胞中,下出会阴,向上前行至阴毛部位，沿腹部和胸部正中线直上，经咽喉，至下颌，环绕口唇，沿面颊，分行至目眶下。

V006-N00047.label: 任脉
V006-N00047.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜生理
V006-N00047.definition: 起于胞中，主胞宫和妊娠，并主一身之阴经，下出会阴，向上前行至阴毛部位，沿腹部和胸部正中线直上，经咽喉，至下颌，环绕口唇，沿面颊，分行至目眶下。

V006-N00047.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00047.label: 任脉
V006-N00047.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00047.definition: The Ren meridian is mainly distributed over the neck, face and along the midline of the chest and abdomen.

V006-N00047.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00047.label: 阴脉之海
V006-N00047.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00047.definition: The Ren meridian governs meridian qi of all yin meridians and is therefore known as “the sea of yin meridians”.

V006-N00047.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00047.label: 任脉
V006-N00047.englishNames: conception vessel; conception vessel(CV); Conception Channel; Conception Vessel

V006-N00047.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00047.label: 任脉

V006-N00047.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00047.label: 任脉
V006-N00047.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates in the lower abdomen, exists at huiyin (CV1), a point in the center of perineum, and ascends the midline of the abdominal wall and chest to chengjiang (CV24), midpoint of the mentolabial sulcus. The i

V006-N00048.label: 冲脉
V006-N00048.aliases: 十二经之海； 经脉之海
V006-N00048.definition: 属奇经八脉。起于胞中，下出会阴，上行脊内，沿腹两侧，上达咽喉，环绕口唇而终。

V006-N00048.label: 冲脉
V006-N00048.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00048.definition: 起于胞中，下出会阴后,从气街部起与足少阴经相并,夹脐上行，散入胸中，上达咽喉，环绕口唇。

V006-N00048.label: 冲脉
V006-N00048.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜生理
V006-N00048.definition: 起于胞中，为月经之本，下出会阴后，从气街部起与足少阴经相并，夹脐上行，散入胸中，上达咽喉，环绕口唇。

V006-N00048.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00048.label: 冲脉
V006-N00048.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00048.definition: The Chong meridian is mainly distributed over the chest and face, inside the spine and along the first lateral line of the abdomen.

V006-N00048.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00048.label: 冲脉
V006-N00048.englishNames: thoroghfare vessel; thoroughfare vessel(TV); Chong Channel; Chong Vessel

V006-N00048.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00048.label: 冲脉
V006-N00048.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates in the lower abdomen, exits at the perineum, and comes into confluence with kidney meridian and then runs upward along the two sides of the abdomen to the chest

V006-N00050.label: 阴维脉
V006-N00050.definition: 属奇经八脉。起于小腿内侧，沿大腿内侧上行至腹部，与足太阴经相合，过胸部与任脉会于颈部。

V006-N00050.label: 阴维脉
V006-N00050.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00050.definition: 起于小腿内侧足三阴经交会之处，沿下肢内侧上行，至腹部，与足太阴脾经同行，到胁部，与足厥阴经相合，然后上行至咽喉，合于任脉。

V006-N00050.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00050.label: 阴维脉
V006-N00050.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00050.definition: The Yinwei meridian is mainly distributed over the medial aspect of the leg and thigh and ascends along the third lateral line of the abdomen. It reaches the throat and meets with the Ren meridian at Tiantu (Ren 22) and Lianquan (Ren 23).

V006-N00050.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00050.label: 阴维脉
V006-N00050.englishNames: yin link vessel; yin link vessel(Yin LV); Yin Link Channel; Yin Link Vessel

V006-N00050.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00050.label: 阴维脉
V006-N00050.englishNames: yin link vessel; Yin Link Channel
V006-N00050.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates from the upper part of the inner ankle, running upward along the medial side of the lower limb, through the abdomen, chest and throat, terminating at the back of the neck

V006-N00051.label: 阳维脉
V006-N00051.definition: 属奇经八脉。起于足跟外侧，上经外踝，沿足少阴经上行髋关节，经胁肋后侧，从腋后上肩，至前额，达项后，合于督脉。

V006-N00051.label: 阳维脉
V006-N00051.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V006-N00051.definition: 起于足跟外侧，向上经过外踝，与足少阳胆经并行，沿下肢外侧上行至髋部，经胁肋后侧，从腋后上肩，至前额，再到项后，合于督脉。

V006-N00051.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00051.label: 阳维脉
V006-N00051.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00051.definition: The Yangwei meridian is mainly distributed below the external malleolus, the lateral aspect of the leg, and over the subcostal area, shoulder and sides of the head. It meets with the Du meridian at Fengfu (Du 16) and Yamen (Du 15).

V006-N00051.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00051.label: 阳维脉
V006-N00051.englishNames: yang link vessel; Yang Link Channel
V006-N00051.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates from the lower part of the outer ankle running upward along the lateral side of the lower limb, through the side of the trunk, the shoulder, neck and terminating at the top of the head

V006-N00052.label: 阴跷脉
V006-N00052.definition: 属奇经八脉。起于足舟骨后方，直上沿大腿内侧，过阴部，沿腹、胸内侧入锁骨上窝，经人迎，过鼻旁至目内眦。

V006-N00052.englishNames: yin heel vessel; yin heel vessel(Yin HV); Yin Heel Channel; Yin Heel Vessel

V006-N00052.label: 阴跷脉
V006-N00052.aliases: 阴蹻脉； Yin Heel Vessel； Yinqiao Vessel
V006-N00052.englishNames: yin heel vessel; Yin Heel Channel
V006-N00052.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates from the medial side of the heel, running upward along the medial side of the lower limb, through the front external genitalia, the abdomen, chest, neck, either side of the nose and terminating in the

V006-N00053.label: 阳跷脉
V006-N00053.definition: 属奇经八脉。起于足跟外侧，沿股外侧和胁后上肩，过颈挟口角，入目内眦再上行至额。

V006-N00053.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00053.label: 阳跷脉
V006-N00053.englishNames: yang heel vessel; yang heel vessel(Yang HV); Yang Heel Channel; Yang Heel Vessel

V006-N00053.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00053.label: 阳跷脉

V006-N00053.englishNames: yang heel vessel; Yang Heel Channel
V006-N00053.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates from the lateral side of the heel, running upward along the outer ankle, the lateral side of the lower limb, through the abdomen, chest, shoulder and cheek, terminating at the back of the neck

V006-N00070.label: 十五络脉
V006-N00070.definition: 十二经脉和任、督二脉各自别出之络与脾之大络的总称。分别以其所发处腧穴命名。

V006-N00070.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00070.label: 十五络脉
V006-N00070.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00070.definition: The fifteen collaterals include the collaterals of the twelve meridians, the collaterals of the Du and Ren meridian as well as the major collateral of the spleen.

V006-N00070.definition: a collective term referring to the main collaterals derived from the fourteen meridians and together with the great collateral of the spleen, fifteen in all

V006-N01144.label: 上病下取
V006-N01144.englishNames: treating lower portion for upper disorder
V006-N01144.definition: 与下病上取相对，与病气上下相反的治疗原则，病变偏于上而治其所在部位以下的脏腑。

V006-N01145.label: 下病上取
V006-N01145.englishNames: treating upper portion for lower disorder
V006-N01145.definition: 与上病下取相对，与病气上下相反的治疗原则，病变偏于下而治其所在部位以上的脏腑。

V006-N00004.label: 针灸学
V006-N00004.englishNames: science of acupuncture and moxibustion of traditional Chinese medicine

V006-N00007.definition: 研究针灸治疗疾病的各种方法、操作技术、临床应用及其原理的一门针灸学科。

V006-N00008.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00008.definition: and moxibustion theraphy运用中医基础理论和经络、腧穴、刺灸法等基础知识来研究针灸预防、治疗疾病的一门针灸学科。

V006-N00013.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00013.label: 经络
V006-N00013.aliases: 经络系统； Meridian Collaterals； Meridians
V006-N00013.englishNames: meridian and collateral; Meridians and Collaterals; Meridian and Collateral
V006-N00013.definition: a system of conduits through which qi and blood circulate, connecting the bowels, viscera, extremities, superficial organs and tissues, making the body an organic whole, the same as channels and networks; meridians or channels, in short

V006-N00017.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V006-N00018.definition: One of the normal pulses: constitutional surging and large on Cun, Guan and Chi positions of both hands.

V006-N00018.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00018.label: 六阳脉
V006-N00018.englishNames: six yang pulses; six yang channels

V006-N00023.label: 经络诊断
V006-N00023.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00023.definition: 以经络腧穴学说为理论基础，以腧穴病理性反应的各种表现形式为指标，进行疾病证候辨别的诊断方法。

V006-N00024.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V006-N00024.definition: 以经络学说为指导，对病人所反映的病史、症状进行综合分析，以判断病位、病性等的辨证方法。

V006-N00024.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V006-N00024.aliases: Syndrome Differ Meridian； Syndrome Differentiation of Meridian
V006-N00024.englishNames: Pattern differentiation of meridians; channel/meridian syndrom differentiation/pattern identification; Syndrome Differentiation Meridian; syndrome differentiation of channel theory
V006-N00024.pinyinNames: jīng luò biàn zhèng; jing luo bian zheng

V006-N00024.definition: A pattern differentiation method based on meridian theory. It aims to analyse clinical signs and symptoms, identify specific meridians and related zang–fu organs and then conclude the etiological factors, pathological nature and pathological mechanism.

V006-N00027.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V006-N00027.definition: 脏腑病变延及所属经脉，反映于经脉循行路线的病证。

V006-N00086.definition: 从十二经脉、任脉、督脉等经脉别行分出的较大络脉主干。

V006-N00086.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V006-N00086.aliases: 别络； 十五别络； 十五络； Fifteen Main Collaterals

V006-N00086.definition: a collective term referring to the main collaterals derived from the fourteen meridians and together with the great collateral of the spleen, fifteen in all

V006-N00105.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V006-N00105.definition: the regions of the skin reflecting the functional condition of the twelve meridians respectively

V006-N00106.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V006-N00106.definition: The word “biao” literally means the tip of tree branches. Here it refers to the head, face and body trunk where meridian qi diffuses. The word “ben” literally means the trunk of a tree. Here it refers to the four limbs where meridian qi gathers.

V006-N00167.label: 经穴
V006-N00167.definition: 归属于十二经脉及任脉、督脉的腧穴。
