V006-N00544.label: 经外奇穴
V006-N00544.definition: 十四经穴以外，具有固定名称、位置和主治等内容的腧穴。

V006-N00544.label: 经外奇穴
V006-N00544.definition: 有固定部位、名称且疗效显著的经外穴。

V006-N00544.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00544.label: 经外奇穴
V006-N00544.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00544.definition: The points that are not contained in the above-mentioned fourteen meridians; however, these points have specific names and locations.

V006-N00544.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00544.label: 经外奇穴

V006-N00132.label: 阿是穴
V006-N00132.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00132.definition: 无固定名称与位置,以病痛局部或与病痛有关的压痛或缓解点为腧穴。

V006-N00132.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00132.label: 阿是穴
V006-N00132.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00132.definition: The points of sensitivity or tenderness. They are neither meridians points nor extra points, and they do not have specific names or locations.

V006-N00132.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00132.label: 阿是穴

V006-N00133.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00133.label: 耳穴
V006-N00133.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00133.definition: Specific stimulation areas distributed on the auricles.

V006-N00133.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00133.label: 耳穴

V006-N00591.label: 耳穴
V006-N00591.definition: 分布在耳廓上的腧穴，是人体各部分的生理病理变化在耳廓上的反应点，用于诊断和治疗疾病。

V006-N00591.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00591.label: 耳穴
V006-N00591.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00591.definition: Specific stimulation areas distributed on the auricles.

V006-N00591.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00591.label: 耳穴

V006-N00136.label: 特定穴
V006-N00136.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00136.definition: 具有特殊治疗作用和特定称号的经穴。

V006-N00136.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00136.label: 特定穴
V006-N00136.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00136.definition: The meridians points that have special names and functions.

V006-N00136.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00136.label: 特定穴

V006-N00137.label: 五输穴
V006-N00137.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00137.definition: 十二经脉在四肢肘、膝关节以下，经气出、溜、注、经、人之处的名为井、荣、输、经、合的五类特定穴。

V006-N00137.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00137.label: 五输穴
V006-N00137.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00137.definition: A collective term of the Jing-well, Ying-spring, Shu-stream, Jing-river and He-sea points. They are all located distal to, or at the elbow and knee joints.

V006-N00137.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00137.label: 五输穴

V006-N00138.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00138.label: 井穴
V006-N00138.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00138.definition: The point at which the qi rises is known as the Jing-well. Most Jing-well points are located on the fingers or toes.

V006-N00138.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00138.label: 井穴

V006-N00139.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00139.label: 荥穴
V006-N00139.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00139.definition: The point at which the qi glides is known as the Ying-spring. The Ying-spring points are generally located distal to the metacarpophalangeal or metatarsophalangeal joints.

V006-N00139.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00139.label: 荥穴

V006-N00140.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00140.label: 输穴
V006-N00140.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00140.definition: The point at which the qi pours through is known as the Shu-stream. The Shu-stream points are generally located proximal to the metacarpophalangeal joints or metatarsophalangeal joints.

V006-N00140.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00140.label: 输穴

V006-N00142.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00142.label: 合穴
V006-N00142.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00142.definition: The point at which the qi enters inwards is known as the He-sea. The He-sea points are located around the joints of the elbows or knees.

V006-N00142.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00142.label: 合穴

V006-N00143.label: 原穴
V006-N00143.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00143.definition: 位于四肢肘膝关节以下，为脏腑原气经过和留止之处的特定穴。

V006-N00143.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00143.label: 原穴
V006-N00143.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00143.definition: The points where the Yuan-primordial qi pools.

V006-N00143.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00143.label: 原穴

V006-N00145.label: 络穴
V006-N00145.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00145.definition: 由经脉分出络脉之处的特定穴。

V006-N00145.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00145.label: 络穴
V006-N00145.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00145.definition: The points where a meridian exits off from the main flow and connects with the Yin/Yang paired meridian.

V006-N00145.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00145.label: 络穴

V006-N00146.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00146.label: 十五络穴

V006-N00147.label: 背俞穴
V006-N00147.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00147.definition: 位于背腰部，为脏腑之气输注之处的特定穴。

V006-N00147.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00147.label: 背俞穴
V006-N00147.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00147.definition: The points on the back where qi of the respective zang–fu organs is infused.

V006-N00147.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00147.label: 背俞穴

V006-N00148.label: 募穴
V006-N00148.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00148.definition: 位于胸腹部，为脏腑之气结聚之处的特定穴。

V006-N00148.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00148.label: 募穴
V006-N00148.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00148.definition: The points on the chest and abdomen where qi of the respective zang–fu organs is infused.

V006-N00148.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00148.label: 募穴

V006-N00149.label: 郄穴
V006-N00149.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00149.definition: 喻经脉气血深聚之处的特定穴。

V006-N00149.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00149.label: 郄穴
V006-N00149.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00149.definition: The points where meridian qi is deeply converged.

V006-N00151.label: 八会穴
V006-N00151.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00151.definition: 脏、腑、气、血、筋、脉、骨、髓之气所聚会的八个特定穴。即脏会章门，腑会中皖,气会膻中，血会膈俞，筋会阳陵泉，脉会太渊，骨会大杼，髓会悬钟。

V006-N00151.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00151.label: 八会穴
V006-N00151.englishNames: eight influential point; Eight influential points
V006-N00151.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00151.definition: The points that have particular effects in the treatment of disorders relating to the zang, fu, qi, blood, tendon, vessels, bones and marrow.

V006-N00151.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00151.label: 八会穴

V006-N00152.label: 下合穴
V006-N00152.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00152.definition: 六腑之气合于下肢足三阳经的特定穴。即胃合足三里，大肠合上巨虚，三焦合委阳，膀胱合委中，胆合阳陵泉。

V006-N00152.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00152.label: 下合穴
V006-N00152.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00152.definition: The points where qi of the six fu organs is infused into the three foot-yang meridians.

V006-N00152.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00152.label: 下合穴

V006-N00153.label: 八脉交会穴
V006-N00153.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00153.definition: 奇经八脉与十二经脉经气相通的八个特定穴。即公孙、内关、后溪、申脉、足临泣、外关、列缺、照海。

V006-N00153.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00153.label: 八脉交会穴
V006-N00153.englishNames: Eight confluent points; eight confluence point
V006-N00153.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00153.definition: The points where qi of the twelve regular meridians meets the eight extraordinary meridians.

V006-N00153.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00153.label: 八脉交会穴
V006-N00153.englishNames: confluence points of eight extraordinary meridians/channels

V006-N00154.label: 交会穴
V006-N00154.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00154.definition: 两条或两条以上经脉交会通过的特定穴。

V006-N00154.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00154.label: 交会穴
V006-N00154.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00154.definition: The points intersected by two or more meridians.

V006-N00154.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00154.label: 交会穴

V006-N00155.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00155.label: 十三鬼穴

V006-N00157.label: 同身寸
V006-N00157.englishNames: proportional unit of body; body cun
V006-N00157.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00157.definition: 以患者本人体表的某些部位折定分寸，量取腧穴的长度单位。

V006-N00157.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00157.label: 同身寸

V006-N00158.label: 横指同身寸 4-
V006-N00158.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00158.definition: 又称"一夫法”。同身寸之一,将食指、中指、无名指和小指并拢，以中指中节横纹为标准,其四指的宽度作为3寸。

V006-N00158.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00158.label: 横指同身寸
V006-N00158.englishNames: finger-breadth cun; 4-finger-breadth meas urement; Four-finger measurement
V006-N00158.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00158.definition: A method to take the width of the patients’ four fingers (index, middle, ring and little) close together at the level of the dorsal skin crease of the proximal interphalangeal joint of the middle finger as three cun. It is also known as “Yi Fu Fa” in Chinese.

V006-N00158.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00158.label: 一夫法

V006-N00158.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00158.label: 横指同身寸

V006-N00159.label: 拇指同身寸
V006-N00159.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00159.definition: 同身寸之一，以拇指指骨关节横纹两端之间的距离作为1寸。

V006-N00159.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00159.label: 拇指同身寸
V006-N00159.englishNames: thumb body-cun; thumb body-inch; thumb cun; proportional unit of thumb; Thumb measurement
V006-N00159.pinyinNames: mu zhi tong shen cun; mǔ zhǐ tóng shēn cùn
V006-N00159.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00159.definition: A method to take the width of the interphalangeal joint of the thumb as 1 cun.

V006-N00159.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00159.label: 拇指同身寸
V006-N00159.englishNames: thumb cun; thumb body-cun; thumb body-inch

V006-N00160.label: 中指同身寸
V006-N00160.englishNames: middle finger cun;proportional unit of middle finger
V006-N00160.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V006-N00160.definition: 同身寸之一，以中指中节桡侧两纹头间的长度为1寸。

V006-N00160.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00160.label: 中指同身寸
V006-N00160.englishNames: Middle finger measurement; middle finger cun; pro portional unit of middle finger; middle finger body-cun; middle finger body-inch
V006-N00160.pinyinNames: zhōng zhǐ tóng shēn cùn; zhong zhi tong shen cun
V006-N00160.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00160.definition: A method to take the distance between the ends of the two radial creases of the interphalangeal joints of the middle finger as 1 cun when the middle finger is flexed.

V006-N00160.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00160.label: 中指同身寸
V006-N00160.englishNames: middle finger cun; middle finger body-cun; middle finger body-inch

V006-N00163.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00163.label: 自然标志定位法
V006-N00163.englishNames: location of points according to natural body landmarks
V006-N00163.pinyinNames: zi ran biao zhi ding wei fa

V006-N00545.label: 四神聪
V006-N00545.definition:
在头部，百会（GV20）前后左右各旁开1寸，共4穴。（见GB/T 22163—2008，图4-1）
注：后神聪在前后发际正中连线的中点处，前顶（GV21）后0.5寸为前神聪。

V006-N00545.label: 四神聪
V006-N00545.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜腧穴
V006-N00545.definition: 经外穴。在头顶部，当百会前后左右各1寸，共4穴。

V006-N00545.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00545.label: 四神聪

V006-N00546.label: 当阳
V006-N00546.definition:
在头部，瞳孔直上，前发际上1寸。（见 GB/T 22163—2008，图4-2）
注：头临泣（GB15）直上0.5寸，横平上星（GV23）。

V006-N00546.label: 当阳
V006-N00546.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜腧穴
V006-N00546.definition: 经外穴。在头前部，当瞳孔直上，前发际上1寸。

V006-N00546.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00546.label: 当阳

V006-N00547.label: 鱼腰
V006-N00547.definition: 在头部，瞳孔直上，眉毛中。（见GB/T 22163—2008，图4-2）

V006-N00547.label: 鱼腰
V006-N00547.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜腧穴
V006-N00547.definition: 经外穴。在额部，瞳孔直上，眉毛中。

V006-N00547.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00547.label: 鱼腰

V006-N00548.label: 太阳
V006-N00548.definition:
在头部，眉梢与目外眦之间，向后约一横指（中指）的凹陷中。（见GB/T 22163—2008，图4-3）
注：丝竹空（TE23）与瞳子髎（GB1）连线中点向外约一横指处。

V006-N00548.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00548.label: 太阳

V006-N00548.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00548.label: 太阳
V006-N00548.englishNames: great yang; Taiyang(acupoint names of EX-HN 5 and GB-1)$temple

V006-N00548.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00548.label: 太阳
V006-N00548.definition: (1) referring to cold qi in the theory of five circuits and six qi; (2) referring to the bladder meridian and small intestine meridian in the meridian theory

V006-N00548.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00548.label: 太阳
V006-N00548.definition: (1) the area on each side of the forehead above the cheek bones, lateral to and slightly superior to the outer canthus of the eye; (2) an non-meridian acupuncture point on the temporal part of the head

V006-N00550.label: 球后
V006-N00550.definition:
在面部，眼球与眶下缘之间，眶下缘外 1/4与内3/4交界处。（见 GB/T 22163—2008，图4-2）
注：承泣（ST1）外上方。

V006-N00550.label: 球后
V006-N00550.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜腧穴
V006-N00550.definition: 经外穴。在面部，当眶下缘外四分之一与内四分之三交界处。

V006-N00550.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00550.label: 球后

V006-N00551.label: 上迎香
V006-N00551.definition: 在面部，鼻翼软骨与鼻甲的交界处，近鼻翼沟上端处。（见 GB/T 22163—2008，图4-2）

V006-N00551.label: 上迎香

V006-N00713.label: 九针
V006-N00713.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00713.definition: 古代针具合称,由九种针具组成。

V006-N00713.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00713.label: 九针
V006-N00713.englishNames: nine needles; nine kinds of classical needles; nine classical needles; Nine ancient needles
V006-N00713.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00713.definition: A collective term for the nine types of needles described in the Nei Jing (Yellow Emperor’s Internal Classic), namely, shear needle, rounded needle, spoon-like needle, sharp-edged needle, round-sharp needle, sword-like needle, long needle, large needle and filiform needle.

V006-N00713.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00713.label: 九针

V006-N00714.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00714.label: 镵针
V006-N00714.englishNames: shear needle; arrowhead-like needle; Shear needle
V006-N00714.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00714.definition: One of the nine ancient needles. It has an arrow-shaped head and often used for superficial insertion in the treatment of heat pattern or skin conditions.

V006-N00715.label: 员针
V006-N00715.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他

V006-N00716.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00716.label: 鍉针
V006-N00716.englishNames: spoon needle; spoon-like needle; Spoon-like needle
V006-N00716.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00716.definition: One of the nine ancient needles. It has a big, thick needle body and a slightly sharp round tip. It is often used for blood problems and heat pattern.

V006-N00717.label: 锋针
V006-N00717.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00717.definition: 九针之一，针身为三棱形，针锋三面有口，十分锐利。

V006-N00717.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00717.label: 锋针
V006-N00717.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00717.definition: One of the nine ancient needles. It is also known as the three-edged needle. It is often used to prick subcutaneous veins or small vessels in the treatment of abscess, heat pattern, acute gastroenteritis, etc.

V006-N00718.label: 铍针
V006-N00718.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00718.definition: 九针之一，长而宽，形如宝剑锋刃。

V006-N00718.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00718.label: 铍针
V006-N00718.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00718.definition: One of the nine ancient needles. It has a (double-edged) sword-like needle tip and is often used to cut open the abscesses to drain pus and blood.

V006-N00719.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00719.label: 员利针
V006-N00719.pinyinNames: yuan li zhen; yuán lì zhēn
V006-N00719.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00719.definition: One of the nine ancient needles. It has a round and sharp needle tip and is often used for abscess, bi-impediment and acute conditions.

V006-N00720.label: 毫针
V006-N00720.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00720.definition: 九针之一，针尖锋利针身较细。

V006-N00720.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00720.label: 毫针
V006-N00720.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00720.definition: One of the nine ancient needles. It is now the most common needle in acupuncture treatment.

V006-N00720.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00720.label: 毫针

V006-N00721.label: 长针
V006-N00721.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00721.definition: 九针之一,针身较大针锋锐利。

V006-N00721.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00721.label: 长针
V006-N00721.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00721.definition: One of the nine ancient needles. It has a longer needle body (approximately 20–30 cm or longer) and is often used for deep insertion in the treatment of chronic rheumatism or sciatica.

V006-N00722.label: 大针
V006-N00722.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00722.definition: 九针之一,针身粗而挺长,其锋微圆。

V006-N00722.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00722.label: 大针
V006-N00722.englishNames: big needle; large needle; Large needle
V006-N00722.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00722.definition: One of the nine ancient needles. It has a thick needle body and a slightly round needle tip. It is often used to treat general oedema or abdominal masses.

V006-N00738.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他

V006-N00760.label: 双手进针法
V006-N00760.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00760.definition: 刺手与押手互相配合，持针刺入腧穴的进针法。

V006-N00760.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00760.label: 双手进针法
V006-N00760.englishNames: double-handed needle insertion; needleinserting with both hands; Needle insertion with both hands; needle insertion with both hands
V006-N00760.pinyinNames: shuāng shǒu jìn zhēn fǎ; shuang shou jin zhen fa
V006-N00760.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00760.definition: A method to insert a needle into a point by using both the puncturing hand and pressing hand.

V006-N00761.label: 指切进针法
V006-N00761.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00761.definition: 用押手的拇指或食指尖按压在腧穴旁，刺手持针将针尖靠近押手指甲刺入腧穴的双手进针法。

V006-N00761.label: 爪切法
V006-N00761.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00761.definition: 针刺时以拇指指甲爪掐腧穴便于准确进针的方法。

V006-N00761.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00761.label: 指切进针法
V006-N00761.englishNames: fingernail-pressing needle insertion; fingernailpressure nee dle inseyting; Nail-pressing insertion
V006-N00761.pinyinNames: zhǐ qiē jìn zhēn fǎ; zhi qie jin zhen fa
V006-N00761.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00761.definition: A method to press the skin of puncturing area with the nail of thumb or index finger of the pressing hand and insert the needle against the fingernail with the needling hand.

V006-N00761.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00761.label: 指切进针法

V006-N00762.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00762.label: 夹持进针法
V006-N00762.englishNames: hand-holding needle insertion; Needle-holding insertion with both hands
V006-N00762.pinyinNames: jia chi jin zhen fa; jiā chí jìn zhēn fǎ
V006-N00762.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00762.definition: A method to hold the lower part of the needle body with a piece of sterile cotton or gauze between the thumb and index finger of the pressing hand while inserting a needle. (Press the skin adjacent to the the needling site with the nail of thumb or index finger of the pressing hand, while inserting a needle against the fingernail with the needling hand).

V006-N00763.label: 舒张进针法
V006-N00763.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00763.definition: 用押手拇、食两指将腧穴的皮肤向两侧撑开,使皮肤绷紧,辅助刺手进针的双手进针法。

V006-N00763.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00763.label: 舒张进针法
V006-N00763.englishNames: skin-spreading needle insertion; skin spreading needle insertion; Skin-stretching insertion; skin stretching needle inserting
V006-N00763.pinyinNames: shu zhang jin zhen fa; shū zhāng jìn zhēn fǎ
V006-N00763.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00763.definition: A method to stretch the skin around the puncturing area with the thumb and index finger (or the index and middle fingers) of the pressing hand while inserting a needle.

V006-N00763.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00763.label: 舒张进针法

V006-N00764.label: 提捏进针法
V006-N00764.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00764.definition: 用押手拇、食两指将腧穴的皮肤捏起,辅助刺手进针的双手进针法。

V006-N00764.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00764.label: 提捏进针法
V006-N00764.englishNames: pinching needle insertion; Skin-pinching insertion; skinpinching up needle inserting
V006-N00764.pinyinNames: tí niē jìn zhēn fǎ; ti nie jin zhen fa
V006-N00764.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00764.definition: A method to pinch and lift the skin of the puncturing area with the thumb and index finger of the pressing hand while inserting a needle.

V006-N00764.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00764.label: 提捏进针法
V006-N00764.englishNames: pinching needle insertion; skinpinching up needle inserting

V006-N00770.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00770.label: 管针进针法
V006-N00770.englishNames: insertion of needle with tube; Guide tube-needle insertion
V006-N00770.pinyinNames: guǎn zhēn jìn zhēn fǎ; guan zhen jin zhen fa
V006-N00770.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00770.definition: A method to insert a needle using a fine tube as a guide.

V006-N00770.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00770.label: 管针进针法

V006-N00773.label: 行针
V006-N00773.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00773.definition: 又称"运针”。毫针刺入腧穴一定深度后，医者根据需要,运用不同的操作方法使针处于运动状态。

V006-N00773.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00773.label: 行针
V006-N00773.englishNames: needle manipulation; manipulating needle; Needling manipulation
V006-N00773.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00773.definition: Manipulating the needle after insertion to produce the desired effect.

V006-N00773.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00773.label: 运针

V006-N00774.label: 行针手法
V006-N00774.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00774.definition: 又称"运针手法”。毫针刺入腧穴皮肤后，医者所进行的提插捻转等行针方法。

V006-N00776.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00776.label: 提插法
V006-N00776.englishNames: lifting and thrusting method; method of lifting-thrusting needle; lifting-thrusting method; Lifting-thrusting method
V006-N00776.pinyinNames: ti cha fa; tí chā fǎ
V006-N00776.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00776.definition: A needling manipulation to lift and thrust a needle.

V006-N00776.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00776.label: 提插法

V006-N00777.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00777.label: 捻转法
V006-N00777.englishNames: twirling method; Twirling or rotating method
V006-N00777.pinyinNames: nian zhuan fa; niǎn zhuǎn fǎ
V006-N00777.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00777.definition: A needling manipulation to twirl (turn) or rotate a needle.

V006-N00777.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00777.label: 捻转法

V006-N00779.label: 循法
V006-N00779.englishNames: mild pressing along channel course;mild pressing along meridian course
V006-N00779.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00779.definition: 医者用手指顺着经脉的循行路径轻柔地上下循按以催气的方法。

V006-N00779.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00779.label: 循法
V006-N00779.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）

V006-N00779.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00779.label: 循法
V006-N00779.englishNames: massage along meridian; massage along channel; mild pressing along channel course; mild pressing along meridian course

V006-N00780.label: 弹法
V006-N00780.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00780.definition: 针刺后在留针过程中，以手指轻弹针尾或针柄,使针体微微振动的催气方法。

V006-N00780.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00780.label: 弹法
V006-N00780.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜推拿类
V006-N00780.definition: A tuina manipulation to flip the area to be treated with fingernails or palmar sides of the fingers.

V006-N00780.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00780.label: 弹柄法

V006-N00780.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00780.label: 弹法

V006-N00780.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00780.label: 弹法
V006-N00780.definition: a manipulation performed by hitting the affected area with the back of the index fingertip or middle fingertip by flicking against the thumb

V006-N00781.label: 刮法
V006-N00781.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00781.definition: 毫针刺入一定深度后，经气未至，用指甲刮动针柄促使得气的方法。

V006-N00781.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00781.label: 刮法
V006-N00781.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜推拿类
V006-N00781.definition: A tuina manipulation to scrape with the radial side of the index finger, on the back of the interphalangeal joint of the index finger. Alternatively, scraping can be done with tools such as spoons or coins.

V006-N00781.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00781.label: 刮柄法

V006-N00782.label: 摇法
V006-N00782.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜推拿学、养生学、康复学
V006-N00782.definition: 以关节为轴,使肢体作环转运动的手法。

V006-N00782.label: 摇法
V006-N00782.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00782.definition: 针刺入一定深度后，手持针柄,将针轻轻摇动的催气方法。

V006-N00782.label: 摇法
V006-N00782.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜骨伤科学｜治疗
V006-N00782.definition: 以关节为轴，使肢体做环转运动的手法。

V006-N00782.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00782.label: 摇法
V006-N00782.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜推拿类
V006-N00782.definition: A tuina manipulation to conduct passive rotation of the affected joint along the axis of motion.

V006-N00782.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00782.label: 摇柄法

V006-N00782.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00782.label: 摇法

V006-N00782.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00782.label: 摇法
V006-N00782.definition: a manipulation performed by holding the part of the limb proximal to the joint with one hand and the part distal to the joint with the other hand, and gently rotating the joint from side to side

V006-N00783.label: 飞法
V006-N00783.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00783.definition: 针刺后,用右手拇食两指执持针柄，细细捻搓数次，然后张开两指，一搓一放，反复数次，状如飞鸟展翅的催气方法。

V006-N00783.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00783.label: 飞法
V006-N00783.englishNames: needlehandle twisting; needle-handle twisting method; Flying method
V006-N00783.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00783.definition: A needling manipulation to twist the needle handle with the thumb and index finger for a couple of times and release the fingers. The repeated twisting and releasing resembles a bird spreading its wings.

V006-N00784.label: 震颤法
V006-N00784.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00784.definition: 针刺入一定深度后,右手持针柄,用小幅度、快频率的提插、捻转手法，使针身轻微震颤的催气方法。

V006-N00784.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00784.label: 震颤法
V006-N00784.englishNames: needlebody trembling; trembling method; Vibrating method
V006-N00784.pinyinNames: zhen chan fa; zhèn chàn fǎ
V006-N00784.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00784.definition: A needling manipulation to hold the handle of the needle and make a small-amplitude and rapid lifting and thrusting to cause the needle to vibrate up and down to promote the flow of qi.

V006-N00784.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00784.label: 震颤法

V006-N00785.label: 搓法
V006-N00785.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜推拿学、养生学、康复学
V006-N00785.definition: 以双手掌置于肢体两侧面，相对用力作方向相反的来回快速搓揉；或以拇指尺侧面及食指桡侧面在患部搓动的手法。

V006-N00785.label: 搓法
V006-N00785.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜骨伤科学｜治疗
V006-N00785.definition: 以手在肢体两侧，相对用力做方向相反的来回快速搓揉的手法。

V006-N00785.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00785.label: 搓法
V006-N00785.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜推拿类
V006-N00785.definition: A tuina manipulation to hold the limb with both hands/palms and apply alternating or back-and-forth twisting.

V006-N00785.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00785.label: 搓柄法

V006-N00785.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00785.label: 搓法

V006-N00785.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00785.label: 搓法
V006-N00785.definition: a manipulation of giving an injured limb twists with two palms in the direction opposite each other

V006-N00788.label: 摄法
V006-N00788.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00788.definition: 入针后，以押手指甲在针刺腧穴所在经络上下进行按捏以催气的方法。

V006-N00789.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00789.label: 按法
V006-N00789.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜推拿类
V006-N00789.definition: A tuina manipulation to apply perpendicular pressure to the surface of the body with the palmar side of the fingers, palms or elbows. It is also one of the common diagnostic methods in tuina practice.

V006-N00789.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00789.label: 按法

V006-N00789.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00789.label: 按法
V006-N00789.definition: a manipulation involving pushing steadily in a direction vertical to the body surface

V006-N00790.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00790.label: 扪法
V006-N00790.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜推拿类
V006-N00790.definition: A tuina manipulation to rub the palms and gently place (the warm palms) over the area to be treated.

V006-N00793.label: 提法
V006-N00793.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜骨伤科学｜治疗
V006-N00793.definition: 用手指捏住治疗部位用力向上牵拉的手法。

V006-N00793.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00793.label: 提法
V006-N00793.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜推拿类
V006-N00793.definition: A tuina manipulation to lift the post-traumatic sunken bones or joints to normal position using one or both hands or with the help of a rope.

V006-N00796.label: 候气
V006-N00796.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00796.definition: 当针下不得气时，医者采取留针或间歇运针以待气至的方法。

V006-N00796.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00796.label: 候气
V006-N00796.englishNames: awaiting qi; Waiting for qi; waiting for qi arrival
V006-N00796.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00796.definition: A method to leave the needle in place for a while after insertion, without any manipulation.

V006-N00799.label: 得气
V006-N00799.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00799.definition: 进行针刺时，患者所产生的酸、麻、重、胀、疼痛或触电样反应等针感以及医者刺手手下的沉紧等感觉。

V006-N00799.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00799.label: 得气
V006-N00799.englishNames: Arrival of qi; atrival of qi; obtaining qi
V006-N00799.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00799.definition: The arrival of qi is signalled by particular sensations felt by the patient and the practitioner. For the patient, it typically refers to soreness, numbness, distension and heaviness felt around the needle (but may move up or down along the meridian). For the practitioner, it refers to a gripping sensation or a feeling of pressure underneath the needle.

V006-N00799.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00799.label: 得气

V006-N00799.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00799.label: 得气

V006-N00800.label: 守气
V006-N00800.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00800.definition: 得气后采取守住针下经气，保持感应持久的方法。

V006-N00800.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00800.label: 守气

V006-N00804.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00804.label: 气至病所
V006-N00804.englishNames: Qi reaches the affected area; qi arrival at disease area
V006-N00804.pinyinNames: qì zhì bìng suǒ; qi zhi bing suo
V006-N00804.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00804.definition: The effect of needling sensation reaching an affected area.

V006-N00804.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00804.label: 气至病所

V006-N00820.label: 针刺补泻
V006-N00820.englishNames: reinforcing and reducingmanipulations of acupuncture therapy
V006-N00820.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00820.definition: 在针刺得气后，根据患者病证的不同情况采用相应的针刺操作，从而达到补虚、泻实的针刺操作方法。

V006-N00820.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00820.label: 针刺补泻
V006-N00820.aliases: Tonifying and sedating manipulation； 补泻手法
V006-N00820.englishNames: reinforcing and reducing manipulations of acupuncture therapy; Reinforcing and reducing manipulation; reinforcing and reducing manipulations of needle
V006-N00820.pinyinNames: zhēn cì bǔ xiè; zhen ci bu xie
V006-N00820.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00820.definition: Needling manipulations to reinforce healthy qi for deficiency pattern and to remove pathogenic factors for excess pattern.

V006-N00856.label: 留针
V006-N00856.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00856.definition: 进针后将针体留在人身体内。

V006-N00856.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00856.label: 留针

V006-N00860.label: 出针
V006-N00860.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他

V006-N00860.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00860.label: 出针
V006-N00860.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00860.definition: To remove a needle when the treatment is done.

V006-N00861.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00861.label: 出针法

V006-N00866.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00866.label: 针刺异常情况
V006-N00866.englishNames: abnormal occurrence during acupuncture; Acupuncture-related adverse events
V006-N00866.pinyinNames: zhen ci yi chang qing kuang; zhēn cì yì cháng qíng kuàng
V006-N00866.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00866.definition: Acupuncture-related adverse events include fainting, stuck needle, bent needle and broken needle. These accidents are often caused by a weak constitution, nervousness, hunger, inappropriate body position or medical negligence.

V006-N00867.label: 晕针
V006-N00867.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00867.definition: 由于针刺而产生的晕厥现象。

V006-N00867.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00867.label: 晕针
V006-N00867.englishNames: faint during acupuncture treatment; fainting during acupuncture treatment; fainting during acupuncture; Needle shock
V006-N00867.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00867.definition: An adverse event during an acupuncture session: Patients may present with a pale complexion or experience dizziness, nausea and chest tightness. In severe cases, cold limbs, cold sweats, drop in blood pressure, syncope or shock may be present.

V006-N00868.label: 滞针
V006-N00868.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00868.definition: 针刺后发生的针下滞涩而捻转提插不便等运针困难的现象。

V006-N00868.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00868.label: 滞针
V006-N00868.englishNames: stucking of needle; Stuck needle; stuck needle
V006-N00868.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00868.definition: Difficulty or impossible to rotate, lift or thrust a needle.

V006-N00869.label: 弯针
V006-N00869.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00869.definition: 针刺时针身在肌体内发生弯曲的现象。

V006-N00869.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00869.label: 弯针
V006-N00869.englishNames: bending of needle; bending of the needle; Bent needle
V006-N00869.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00869.definition: The needle body becomes bent upon insertion or retention.

V006-N00870.label: 折针
V006-N00870.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00870.definition: 针刺时针体发生折断的现象。

V006-N00870.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00870.label: 断针
V006-N00870.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00870.definition: The needle body is broken and the broken part is on or below the skin surface.

V006-N00875.label: 刺禁
V006-N00875.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜医史文献｜其他

V006-N00878.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00878.label: 缪刺
V006-N00878.englishNames: contralateral collateral needling; Miu needling; Contralateral blood-letting
V006-N00878.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00878.definition: A technique to conduct blood-letting on the left side if the right side is affected, or vice versa.

V006-N00878.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00878.label: 缪刺

V006-N00879.label: 九刺
V006-N00879.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00879.definition: 输刺、远道刺、经刺、络刺、分刺、大泻刺、毛刺、巨刺、粹刺九种刺法的合称。

V006-N00879.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00879.label: 九刺
V006-N00879.englishNames: The nine needling techniques; nine techniques of needling; nine needling (methods); nine needlings
V006-N00879.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00879.definition: A collective term for nine ancient needling techniques, namely, Shu needling, distant needling, meridian needling, collateral needling, intramuscular needling, great drainage needling, skin needling, cauterized needling and contralateral needling.

V006-N00879.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00879.label: 九刺

V006-N00880.label: 输刺
V006-N00880.path: 刺法灸法｜毫针刺法｜毫针特殊刺法｜五刺
V006-N00880.definition: 五刺之一。针刺时直入直出，深内至骨，以治疗骨痹的刺法。

V006-N00880.label: 输刺
V006-N00880.path: 刺法灸法｜毫针刺法｜毫针特殊刺法｜十二刺
V006-N00880.definition: 十二刺之一。垂直刺入较深处候气，得气后缓慢退针，以治疗“气盛而热”的刺法。

V006-N00880.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00880.label: 输刺

V006-N00896.label: 输刺
V006-N00896.path: 刺法灸法｜毫针刺法｜毫针特殊刺法｜九刺
V006-N00896.definition: 九刺之一。针刺相关经脉肘膝以下的荥穴和输穴，以及背部相关的五脏俞(肺俞、心俞、肝俞、脾俞、肾俞)，以治疗五脏病的刺法。

V006-N00896.label: 输刺
V006-N00896.path: 刺法灸法｜毫针刺法｜毫针特殊刺法｜五刺
V006-N00896.definition: 五刺之一。针刺时直入直出，深内至骨，以治疗骨痹的刺法。

V006-N00896.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00896.label: 输刺

V006-N00907.label: 输刺
V006-N00907.path: 刺法灸法｜毫针刺法｜毫针特殊刺法｜九刺
V006-N00907.definition: 九刺之一。针刺相关经脉肘膝以下的荥穴和输穴，以及背部相关的五脏俞(肺俞、心俞、肝俞、脾俞、肾俞)，以治疗五脏病的刺法。

V006-N00907.label: 输刺
V006-N00907.path: 刺法灸法｜毫针刺法｜毫针特殊刺法｜十二刺
V006-N00907.definition: 十二刺之一。垂直刺入较深处候气，得气后缓慢退针，以治疗“气盛而热”的刺法。

V006-N00907.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00907.label: 输刺

V006-N00881.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00881.label: 远道刺
V006-N00881.englishNames: Yuandao needling; distant needling; Distal needling
V006-N00881.pinyinNames: yuan dao ci; yuǎn dào cì
V006-N00881.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00881.definition: A technique to puncture points on the lower body (i.e. the lower He-sea points of the six fu organs) to treat problems of the upper body.

V006-N00881.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00881.label: 远道刺

V006-N00882.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00882.label: 经刺
V006-N00882.englishNames: meridian needling; Jing needling; Meridian needling
V006-N00882.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00882.definition: A technique to acupuncture stasis/tenderness points along the pathways of meridians.

V006-N00882.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00882.label: 经刺

V006-N00883.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00883.label: 络刺
V006-N00883.englishNames: Luo needling; Collateral needling; collateral needling
V006-N00883.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00883.definition: A technique to prick small vessels with a three-edged needle for bloodletting.

V006-N00883.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00883.label: 络刺

V006-N00884.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00884.label: 分刺
V006-N00884.englishNames: intermuscular needling; Fen needling; Intramuscular needling
V006-N00884.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00884.definition: A technique to puncture directly into the muscle.

V006-N00884.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00884.label: 分刺

V006-N00885.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00885.label: 大泻刺
V006-N00885.englishNames: great drainage needling; Daxie needling; Great drainage needling; drainage needling
V006-N00885.pinyinNames: da xie ci; dà xiè cì
V006-N00885.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00885.definition: A technique to incise with a sword-shaped needle to drain pus or eliminate stagnant blood, also known as lancing.

V006-N00885.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00885.label: 大泻刺

V006-N00886.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00886.label: 毛刺
V006-N00886.englishNames: skin needling; Skin needling; Mao needling
V006-N00886.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00886.definition: A technique to puncture shallowly into the skin.

V006-N00886.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00886.label: 毛刺

V006-N00887.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00887.label: 巨刺
V006-N00887.englishNames: Contralateral needling; contralateral channel needling; Ju needling
V006-N00887.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00887.definition: A technique to puncture points on the left side if the right side is affected, or vice versa.

V006-N00887.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00887.label: 巨刺

V006-N00888.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00888.label: 焠刺
V006-N00888.englishNames: red-hot needling; Cauterized needling; Cui needling
V006-N00888.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00888.definition: A technique to prick swiftly with a cauterized needle. Indicated for cold bi-impediment pattern.

V006-N00888.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00888.label: 焠刺

V006-N00889.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00889.label: 十二刺
V006-N00889.englishNames: twelve needling methods; The twelve needling techniques; twelve needlings; twelve techniques of needling
V006-N00889.pinyinNames: shi er ci; shí èr cì; shi dong ci
V006-N00889.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00889.definition: A collective term for twelve ancient needling techniques, namely: coupled needling; successive trigger needling; relaxing needling; triple needling; quintuple needling; straight needling; Shu needling; short needling; superficial needling; yin needling; accompanied needling; and repeated shallow needling.

V006-N00889.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00889.label: 十二刺

V006-N00890.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00890.label: 偶刺
V006-N00890.englishNames: Coupled needling; paired needling; Ou needling
V006-N00890.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00890.definition: A technique to puncture the tenderness spots felt on the front (corresponding to the front-Mu point) and back (corresponding to the back-Shu point).

V006-N00890.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00890.label: 偶刺

V006-N00891.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00891.label: 报刺
V006-N00891.englishNames: successive trigger needling; Bao needling; Successive trigger needling
V006-N00891.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00891.definition: A technique to puncture migratory Ashi points: while needling directly at the tender point, searching for other tender points over the surrounding area and needling in succession.

V006-N00891.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00891.label: 报刺

V006-N00892.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00892.label: 恢刺
V006-N00892.englishNames: relaxing needling; Relaxing needling; Hui needling
V006-N00892.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00892.definition: A technique to insert the needle from the side of the tendon and then puncture the contracted muscle in different directions to induce relaxation.

V006-N00892.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00892.label: 恢刺

V006-N00893.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00893.label: 齐刺
V006-N00893.englishNames: triple needling; Triple needling; Qi needling
V006-N00893.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00893.definition: A technique to insert one needle perpendicularly, coupled with two more needles by its sides. Used to remove cold in a small, deeper area.

V006-N00893.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00893.label: 齐刺

V006-N00894.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00894.label: 扬刺
V006-N00894.englishNames: shallow surround needling; central-square needling; Quintuple needling; Yang needling
V006-N00894.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00894.definition: A technique to insert one needle perpendicularly in the centre, coupled with four more needles anterior, posterior, right, and left to the perpendicular needle. Used to remove cold in a large, shallow area.

V006-N00894.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00894.label: 扬刺

V006-N00895.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00895.label: 直针刺
V006-N00895.englishNames: Straight needling; perpendicular needling; Zhizhen needling; direct subcutaneous needling
V006-N00895.pinyinNames: zhí zhēn cì; zhi zhen ci
V006-N00895.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00895.definition: A technique to pinch the skin and insert the needle subcutaneously (The word “straight” here means towards the affected shallow area). Used to remove cold in the superficial area.

V006-N00895.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00895.label: 直针刺

V006-N00897.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00897.label: 短刺
V006-N00897.englishNames: short thrust needling; Short needling; short needling; Duan needling
V006-N00897.pinyinNames: duǎn cì; duan ci; dong ci
V006-N00897.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00897.definition: A technique to insert the needle slowly while gently shaking the needle, followed by mild rotation when the needle is close to the bone. Used to treat bone pain or tenderness.

V006-N00897.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00897.label: 短刺

V006-N00898.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00898.label: 浮刺
V006-N00898.englishNames: superficial needling; Fu needling; Superficial needling
V006-N00898.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00898.definition: A technique to puncture the superficial area obliquely. Used indicated for muscle pain with a cold sensation.

V006-N00898.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00898.label: 浮刺

V006-N00899.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00899.label: 阴刺
V006-N00899.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00899.definition: A technique to puncture bilateral Taixi (KI 3) (the Yuan-primordial point of the kidney meridian) simultaneously. Used to treat cold limbs.

V006-N00899.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00899.label: 阴刺

V006-N00900.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00900.label: 傍针刺
V006-N00900.englishNames: Bangzhen needling; Accompanied needling; proximate needling
V006-N00900.pinyinNames: bang zhen ci; bàng zhēn cì
V006-N00900.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00900.definition: A technique to insert one needle perpendicularly, coupled with another one lateral to its side. Indicated for tenderness or pain with a fixed location.

V006-N00900.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00900.label: 傍针刺

V006-N00901.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00901.label: 赞刺
V006-N00901.englishNames: Zan needling; Repeated shallow needling; repeated shallow needling
V006-N00901.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00901.definition: A technique to repeatedly puncture the shallow areas to cause bloodletting. Often used for carbuncles or abscesses.

V006-N00901.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00901.label: 赞刺

V006-N00902.label: 五刺
V006-N00902.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00902.definition: 半刺、豹文刺、关刺、合谷刺、输刺等五种刺法的合称。

V006-N00902.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00902.label: 五刺
V006-N00902.englishNames: The five needling techniques; five techniques of needling; five needling techniques; five needling (methods); five needlings
V006-N00902.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00902.definition: A collective term for five ancient needling techniques, namely, half needling, leopard-spot needling, joint needling, Hegu needling, and Shu needling.

V006-N00902.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00902.label: 五刺
V006-N00902.englishNames: five needling (methods); five needling techniques; five techniques of needling

V006-N00903.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00903.label: 半刺
V006-N00903.englishNames: Ban needling; Half needling; half needling
V006-N00903.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00903.definition: A technique characterized by a shallow insertion and swift withdrawal. It is often used for lung-related problems.

V006-N00903.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00903.label: 半刺

V006-N00904.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00904.label: 豹文刺
V006-N00904.englishNames: Leopard-spot needling; leopard-spot needling; Baowen needling
V006-N00904.pinyinNames: bào wén cì; bao wen ci
V006-N00904.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00904.definition: A technique characterized by pricking with a three-edged needle around the point, causing leopard spot-like haemorrhagic spots. It is often used for heart-related problems.

V006-N00904.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00904.label: 豹文刺

V006-N00905.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00905.label: 关刺
V006-N00905.englishNames: joint needling; Guan needling; Joint needling
V006-N00905.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00905.definition: A technique characterized by puncturing the tendon close to the joint without causing bleeding. It is often used for liver-related problems.

V006-N00905.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00905.label: 关刺

V006-N00906.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00906.label: 合谷刺
V006-N00906.pinyinNames: he gu ci; hé gǔ cì
V006-N00906.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00906.definition: A technique characterized by puncturing the muscles of the affected region with the needle going obliquely right and left, resembling the claws of a chicken. It is often used for spleen-related problems.

V006-N00906.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00906.label: 合谷刺

V006-N00911.label: 灸法
V006-N00911.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00911.definition: 用艾绒或其他药物放置在体表的腧穴上烧灼、温熨等，借灸火的温和热力以及药物的作用，通过经络的传导，起到温通气血，扶正祛邪，达到治疗疾病和预防保健的方法。

V006-N00911.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V006-N00911.label: 灸法
V006-N00911.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜治疗干预

V006-N00911.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00911.label: 灸法
V006-N00911.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00911.definition: A therapeutic method to apply burning mugwort (moxa) or other substances near or to particular points or areas of the body to relax, warm and tonify.

V006-N00911.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00911.label: 灸法

V006-N00912.label: 艾绒
V006-N00912.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00912.definition: 由艾叶制成的色泽灰白，柔软如绒的施灸材料。

V006-N00912.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00912.label: 艾绒
V006-N00912.englishNames: moxa floss; Moxa wool; moxa wool
V006-N00912.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00912.definition: Processed moxa leaves that concentrates the white hairs on the underside of the leaf.

V006-N00913.label: 壮
V006-N00913.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他

V006-N00913.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00913.label: 壮
V006-N00913.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00913.definition: A dosage unit to count the number of moxa cones.

V006-N00918.label: 艾灸
V006-N00918.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00918.definition: 以艾绒为主要材料制成艾炷或艾条，点燃后熏熨或温灼体表腧穴的灸法。

V006-N00919.label: 艾炷
V006-N00919.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00919.definition: 由艾绒制成的圆锥形艾团。

V006-N00919.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00919.label: 艾炷
V006-N00919.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00919.definition: Cone-shaped mass made of moxa wool

V006-N00924.label: 着肤灸
V006-N00924.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00924.definition: 又称“直接灸”。把艾炷直接放在施灸部位皮肤上的灸法。

V006-N00924.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00924.label: 直接灸
V006-N00924.pinyinNames: zhijie jiu; zhi jie jiu; zhí jiē jiǔ
V006-N00924.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00924.definition: A method to place a moxa cone directly on the selected area and then ignite to create a superficial burn.

V006-N00925.label: 瘢痕灸
V006-N00925.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00925.definition: 将艾炷直接置于施灸部位上点燃施灸，以使局部皮肤起泡，化脓，形成永久性瘢痕的直接灸法。

V006-N00925.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00925.label: 化脓灸
V006-N00925.pinyinNames: huà nóng jiǔ; hua nong jiu
V006-N00925.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）

V006-N00925.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00925.label: 瘢痕灸
V006-N00925.aliases: 有痕灸； 化脓灸； 打脓灸
V006-N00925.pinyinNames: ban hen jiu; bān hén jiǔ
V006-N00925.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00925.definition: A method to place a small moxa cone directly on the skin, then ignite until the skin blisters and then scars after it heals.

V006-N00925.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V006-N00925.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00925.label: 瘢痕灸

V006-N00926.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00926.label: 无瘢痕灸
V006-N00926.pinyinNames: wú bān hén jiǔ; wu ban hen jiu
V006-N00926.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00926.definition: A method to place a small moxa cone directly on the skin, then ignite and remove the burning moxa before the skin burns enough to scar.

V006-N00926.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V006-N00926.label: 非化脓灸

V006-N00927.label: 隔物灸
V006-N00927.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00927.definition: 又称“间接灸（indirectmoxibustion）”。艾炷与施灸部位皮肤之间衬隔物品的灸法。

V006-N00927.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00927.label: 间接灸
V006-N00927.aliases: 间隔灸； 隔物灸； 间隔灸，隔物灸； Insulated moxibustion
V006-N00927.pinyinNames: jian jie jiu; jiàn jiē jiǔ
V006-N00927.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00927.definition: A method to place some insulated materials between the moxa cone and the skin.

V006-N00927.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00927.label: 间接灸

V006-N00927.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00927.label: 隔物灸
V006-N00927.englishNames: indirect moxibustion; sandwiched moxibustion; indirect moxibustio

V006-N00930.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00930.label: 隔盐灸
V006-N00930.englishNames: moxibustion on salt; salt interposed moxibustion; Salt-insulated moxibustion
V006-N00930.pinyinNames: ge yan jiu; gé yán jiǔ
V006-N00930.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00930.definition: A method to place some salt (usually at Shenque (Ren 8)) between the moxa cone and the skin.

V006-N00931.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00931.label: 隔附子饼灸
V006-N00931.aliases: 附子灸、隔附子灸； Monkshood moxibustion
V006-N00931.englishNames: monkshood cake interposed moxibustion; Monkshood cake-insulated moxibustion
V006-N00931.pinyinNames: ge fu zi bing jiu; gé fù zǐ bǐng jiǔ
V006-N00931.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00931.definition: A method to place a monkshood cake between the moxa cone and the skin.

V006-N00934.label: 艾条
V006-N00934.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00934.definition: 用棉纸包裹艾绒制成的圆柱形长卷。

V006-N00934.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00934.label: 艾条
V006-N00934.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00934.definition: A cigar-shaped roll of mugwort wrapped in cotton paper.

V006-N00935.label: 清艾条
V006-N00935.definition: 由艾绒组成。理气血，逐寒湿，温经止痛。用于心腹冷痛，泄泻转筋，骨节酸痛，四肢麻木，腰酸疼痛等。

V006-N00936.label: 药艾条
V006-N00936.aliases: Drug Moxa Stick； Medicinal Moxa Stick
V006-N00936.englishNames: yao ai tiao; Yao Ai Tiao
V006-N00936.pinyinNames: Yao Ai Tiao; Yao'ai Tiao; yao ai tiao
V006-N00936.definition: 由艾叶、桂枝、高良姜、广藿香、降香、香附、白芷、陈皮、丹参、生川乌组成。行气血，逐寒湿。用于风寒湿痹，肌肉酸麻，关节四肢疼痛，脘腹冷痛。

V006-N00936.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00936.label: 药艾条
V006-N00936.englishNames: medicinal moxa stick; Medicinal moxa stick
V006-N00936.pinyinNames: yao ai tiao; yào ài tiáo
V006-N00936.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）

V006-N00937.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00937.label: 艾卷灸

V006-N00938.label: 悬起灸
V006-N00938.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00938.definition: 将艾条悬于腧穴上方施行的灸法。

V006-N00938.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00938.label: 悬灸
V006-N00938.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00938.definition: An indirect moxibustion method to hold a moxa stick above the skin during the treatment.

V006-N00938.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00938.label: 悬灸

V006-N00940.label: 回旋灸
V006-N00940.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00940.definition: 施灸时，艾卷点燃的一端与施灸部位的皮肤保持一定距离，向左向右方向移动、反复旋转的悬起灸。

V006-N00940.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00940.label: 回旋灸
V006-N00940.englishNames: circling moxibustion; revolving moxibustion; Circling moxibustion
V006-N00940.pinyinNames: hui xuan jiu; huí xuán jiǔ
V006-N00940.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00940.definition: An indirect moxibustion method to keep the end of an ignited moxa stick at a fixed distance from the selected area and move it back and forth circularly.

V006-N00940.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00940.label: 回旋灸

V006-N00941.label: 雀啄灸
V006-N00941.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00941.definition: 将艾条燃着的一端接近施灸部位,待其有灼痛感后迅速提起，如此一上一下如同雀啄的悬起灸。

V006-N00941.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00941.label: 雀啄灸
V006-N00941.englishNames: pecking sparrow moxibustion; sparrow pecking-like moxibustion; Sparrow-pecking moxibustion
V006-N00941.pinyinNames: que zhuo jiu; què zhuó jiǔ
V006-N00941.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00941.definition: An indirect moxibustion method to place an ignited moxa stick near the selected area and move it up and down like a pecking bird.

V006-N00941.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00941.label: 雀啄灸

V006-N00942.label: 实按灸
V006-N00942.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00942.definition: 施灸时，先在施灸部位垫上布或纸数层，然后将药物艾条的一端点燃，趁热按到施灸部位上，使热力透达深部的艾条灸。

V006-N00942.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00942.label: 实按灸
V006-N00942.englishNames: pressing moxibustion; paper or clothseparated moxibustion; Mild-warm moxibustion
V006-N00942.pinyinNames: shí àn jiǔ; shi an jiu
V006-N00942.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00942.definition: An indirect moxibustion method to place several layers of cloth or cotton paper on the selected area and then press the ignited end of a moxa stick to allow the heat to penetrate the skin.

V006-N00942.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00942.label: 实按灸

V006-N00943.label: 雷火神针
V006-N00943.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00943.definition: 含有沉香、木香、乳香、茵陈、羌活、干姜、穿山甲、麝香等药物的艾条。

V006-N00943.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00943.label: 雷火神针
V006-N00943.englishNames: thunderfire miraculous moxa roll; thunder-fire wonder moxibustion; Thunder-fire moxa stick
V006-N00943.pinyinNames: lei huo shen zhen; léi huǒ shén zhēn
V006-N00943.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00943.definition: An indirect moxibustion method to apply an ignited moxa stick to the selected area. The moxa stick is made of fine powder of Chen Xiang (Lignum Aquilariae Resinatum), Mu Xiang (Radix Aucklandiae), Ru Xiang (Olibanum), Yin Chen (Herba Artemisiae Scopariae), Qiang Huo (Rhizoma et Radix Notopterygii), Gan Jiang (Rhizoma Zingiberis), Chuan Shan Jia (Squama Manitis), and She Xiang(Moschus).

V006-N00943.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00943.label: 雷火神针

V006-N00944.label: 太乙神针
V006-N00944.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00944.definition: 含有檀香、山柰、羌活、桂枝、木香、雄黄、白芷、细辛等药物的艾条。

V006-N00944.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00944.label: 太乙神针
V006-N00944.englishNames: Taiyi moxa stick; taivi miraculous moxa roll; Taiyi moxa stick moxibustion
V006-N00944.pinyinNames: tài yǐ shén zhēn; tai yi shen zhen
V006-N00944.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00944.definition: An indirect moxibustion method to apply an ignited moxa stick to the selected area. The moxa stick is made of fine powder of Tan Xiang (Lignum Santali Albi), Shan Nai (Rhizoma Kaempferiae), Qiang Huo (Rhizoma et Radix Notopterygii), Gui Zhi (Ramulus Cinnamomi), Mu Xiang (Radix Aucklandiae), Xiong Huang (Realgar), Bai Zhi (Radix Angelicae Dahuricae) and Xi Xin (Radix et Rhizoma Asari).

V006-N00944.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00944.label: 太乙神针

V006-N00948.label: 温灸器灸
V006-N00948.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00948.definition: 用特制的器具施行的艾灸法。

V006-N00948.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00948.label: 温灸器灸
V006-N00948.englishNames: Moxibustion with a moxa burner; moxa burner moxibustion; moxibustion with moxibustioner
V006-N00948.pinyinNames: wēn jiǔ qì jiǔ; wen jiu qi jiu
V006-N00948.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00948.definition: A method to put moxa wool or stick into a metal box or canister, ignite and then place the box or canister over the selected area.

V006-N00948.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00948.label: 温灸器灸

V006-N00952.label: 保健灸
V006-N00952.englishNames: keeping fit moxibustion; health preserving moxibustion
V006-N00952.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00952.definition: 以养生保健、延年益寿为目的而施行的灸法。

V006-N00959.label: 灸禁
V006-N00959.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜医史文献｜其他

V006-N00965.label: 灯火灸
V006-N00965.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00965.definition: 用灯心草蘸油燃火在施术部位直接点灼的灸法。

V006-N00965.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00965.label: 灯火灸
V006-N00965.englishNames: rushfire cauterization; burning rush moxibustion; juncibustion; Juncus moxibustion
V006-N00965.pinyinNames: deng huo jiu; dēng huǒ jiǔ
V006-N00965.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00965.definition: A method to apply a quick momentary touch to the selected area with an ignited oiled rush of Juncus.

V006-N00965.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00965.label: 灯火灸

V006-N00965.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00965.label: 灯草灸

V006-N00982.label: 玻璃罐
V006-N00982.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00982.definition: 用玻璃制成的拔罐用具。

V006-N00983.label: 竹罐
V006-N00983.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他

V006-N00983.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00983.label: 竹罐

V006-N00983.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00983.label: 竹罐
V006-N00983.definition: a cupping instrument made of bamboo

V006-N00984.label: 陶罐
V006-N00984.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他

V006-N00984.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00984.label: 陶罐

V006-N00985.label: 抽气罐
V006-N00985.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00985.definition: 罐底有橡皮活塞，可接通吸引器造成负压的拔罐用具。利用点火燃烧法排除罐内空气造成负压的拔罐疗法。

V006-N00985.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00985.label: 抽气罐

V006-N00985.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00985.label: 抽气罐
V006-N00985.definition: a cup or jar with a rubber valve through which the air inside can be withdrawn by an aspirator

V006-N00987.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00987.label: 火罐法
V006-N00987.englishNames: Fire cupping; fire cupping; fire cupping method
V006-N00987.pinyinNames: huǒ guàn fǎ; huo guan fa
V006-N00987.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00987.definition: A method to create negative pressure by introducing an ignited material inside the cup to consume the air, thereby enabling the cup to suck itself onto the skin. There are three different approaches: fire twinkling; fire throwing; and cotton sticking.

V006-N00987.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00987.label: 火罐法

V006-N00990.label: 贴棉法
V006-N00990.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N00990.definition: 用大小适宜的酒精棉一块,贴在罐内壁的下1/3处，用火将酒精点燃后，迅速扣在施术部位的火罐法。

V006-N00990.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00990.label: 贴棉法
V006-N00990.englishNames: cotton-burning cupping method; Cotton sticking; burning cotton method; cotton fire cupping
V006-N00990.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00990.definition: A method to stick an alcoholic cotton ball on the inner wall (the lower 1/3), ignite the cotton ball and quickly place the cup over the selected area.

V006-N00990.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00990.label: 贴棉法

V006-N00990.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00990.label: 贴棉法
V006-N00990.definition: a cupping procedure performed by placing a thin layer of alcohol-cotton on the lower one third of the cup wall, and pressing the cup onto the treated area after igniting the cotton

V006-N00993.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00993.label: 闪罐法
V006-N00993.pinyinNames: shan guan fa; shǎn guàn fǎ
V006-N00993.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00993.definition: A method to rapidly place and remove the cup repeatedly over the selected area until the local skin becomes red.

V006-N00994.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00994.label: 走罐法
V006-N00994.aliases: Moving cupping； 推罐法、行罐法
V006-N00994.pinyinNames: zǒu guàn fǎ; zou guan fa
V006-N00994.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00994.definition: A method to lubricate the cup mouth and selected area first and then slide the cup up and down while retaining its suction.

V006-N00995.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00995.label: 留罐法
V006-N00995.pinyinNames: liú guàn fǎ; liu guan fa
V006-N00995.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00995.definition: Leave the cup in place after suction.

V006-N00995.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00995.label: 坐罐

V006-N00995.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00995.label: 留罐
V006-N00995.englishNames: retained cupping; Retenting of the Cup
V006-N00995.definition: a common method of cupping in which the cup or jar is kept at the same site for a certain period of time

V006-N00996.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V006-N00996.label: 刺络拔罐法
V006-N00996.definition: a combined method of pricking and cupping in which pricking with a three-edged needle is followed by cupping to increase bloodletting

V006-N00997.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00997.label: 水罐法
V006-N00997.aliases: 水煮法； 水吸法； Water suction
V006-N00997.englishNames: boiling water cupping method; Boiling cup method
V006-N00997.pinyinNames: shui guan fa; shuǐ guàn fǎ
V006-N00997.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00997.definition: A method to boil a cup in water to create negative pressure: to hold the boiled bamboo cup (the mouth facing downwards) with a forceps, cover the cup mouth with a towel to absorb the water in the cup, and then quickly place the cup over the selected area.

V006-N00997.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00997.label: 水罐法

V006-N00998.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N00998.label: 药罐
V006-N00998.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N00998.definition: A boiling cup method to boil bamboo cups in medicinal liquid and then apply to the body.

V006-N00999.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N00999.label: 抽气罐法

V006-N01006.label: 三棱针
V006-N01006.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01006.definition: 针身呈三棱形,尖端三面有利刃的针具。

V006-N01006.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01006.label: 三棱针
V006-N01006.englishNames: threeedged needle; three-edged needle; The three-edged needle
V006-N01006.pinyinNames: san leng zhen; sān léng zhēn
V006-N01006.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01006.definition: A thick needle with a round handle, a triangular body and a sharp tip similar to a lancet needle. It derives from the Sharp-edged Needle (one of the nine ancient needles).

V006-N01015.label: 皮肤针
V006-N01015.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01015.definition: 多枚针集束固定，用以浅刺皮肤的针具。

V006-N01015.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01015.label: 皮肤针
V006-N01015.englishNames: cutaneous needle; dermal needle; The dermal needle
V006-N01015.pinyinNames: pí fū zhēn; pi fu zhen
V006-N01015.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01015.definition: Needling instrument composed of several short needles used for tapping the points, such as the plum-blossom needle or seven-star needle. These needles cannot be reused without sterilization.

V006-N01015.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01015.label: 皮肤针

V006-N01016.label: 皮肤针疗法
V006-N01016.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01016.definition: 用皮肤针刺激机体腧穴以治疗疾病的方法。

V006-N01020.label: 七星针
V006-N01020.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01020.definition: 集针七枚，如七星攒聚的皮肤针。

V006-N01020.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01020.label: 七星针
V006-N01020.englishNames: seven-star needle; The seven-star needle; sevenstar needle
V006-N01020.pinyinNames: qi xing zhen; qī xīng zhēn
V006-N01020.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01020.definition: A dermal needle that has seven short needles attached to the end of a handle in a cluster. This needle cannot be reused without sterilization.

V006-N01020.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01020.label: 七星针

V006-N01022.label: 梅花针
V006-N01022.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01022.definition: 集针五枚，形如梅花的皮肤针。

V006-N01022.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01022.label: 梅花针
V006-N01022.englishNames: plum-blossom needle; The plum-blossom needle; plumblossom needle
V006-N01022.pinyinNames: mei hua zhen; méi huā zhēn
V006-N01022.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01022.definition: A dermal needle that has a bundle of five short, embedded needles resembling a plum blossom. This needle cannot be reused without sterilization.

V006-N01022.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01022.label: 梅花针

V006-N01025.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01025.label: 罗汉针

V006-N01027.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01027.label: 揿针
V006-N01027.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01027.definition: An intradermal needle that is shaped like a thumbtack used for extended auricular therapy, approximately 0.2 mm–1.5 mm in length.

V006-N01030.label: 电针仪
V006-N01030.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01030.definition: 可以输出电流，利用电刺激代替手法刺激的一种仪器。

V006-N01030.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01030.label: 电针仪

V006-N01042.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01042.label: 芒针
V006-N01042.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01042.definition: A therapeutic method to puncture one point towards another one subcutaneously using a long, thready needle like wheat awn. It derives from the Long Needle (one of the nine ancient needles).

V006-N01044.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01044.label: 火针
V006-N01044.aliases: 燔针； Cauterized needle； 燔针、煨针
V006-N01044.englishNames: Fire needling; fire needling; fire needle
V006-N01044.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01044.definition: A therapeutic method to insert a hot needle to the affected area and remove immediately afterwards.

V006-N01059.label: 指针疗法
V006-N01059.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01059.definition: 以指代针，对腧穴进行按压以治疗疾病的方法。

V006-N01070.label: 砭石
V006-N01070.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜医史文献｜其他
V006-N01070.definition: 古代利用楔状石器医疗的工具。

V006-N01070.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01070.label: 砭石
V006-N01070.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01070.definition: Pointed or wedge-shaped stones historically used to stimulate the surface of the body, drain pus or let blood out.

V006-N01070.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01070.label: 砭石

V006-N01073.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01073.label: 滚刺筒

V006-N01075.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01075.label: 刮痧板
V006-N01075.pinyinNames: gua sha ban; guā shā bǎn
V006-N01075.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01075.definition: Guasha tools are often made from buffalo horn, Bian-stone or jade.

V006-N01115.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01115.label: 金针

V006-N01116.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01116.label: 银针

V006-N01122.label: 电热针
V006-N01122.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01122.definition: 利用电流产生热效应以代替温针和火针的针灸仪器。

V006-N01122.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01122.label: 电热针

V006-N01153.label: 局部取穴
V006-N01153.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01153.definition: 在病痛所在的部位选取腧穴。

V006-N01165.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01165.label: 以痛为输

V006-N01166.label: 配穴法
V006-N01166.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他

V006-N01167.label: 本经配穴法
V006-N01167.englishNames: combination of affected channel;association of affected channel;combination of affected meridian; association of affected meridian
V006-N01167.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01167.definition: 选取同属于一条经脉的腧穴配合应用，以防治本经及其内脏的病变的配穴方法。

V006-N01167.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01167.label: 本经配穴法
V006-N01167.englishNames: point combination of the same meridian; same meridian points combination; combination of affected channel; association of affected channel; combination of affected meridian; association of affected meridian; Point combination of the affected meridian; point combination on the same meridian/channel
V006-N01167.pinyinNames: ben jing pei xue fa; běn jīng pèi xué fǎ
V006-N01167.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01167.definition: A method to combine points along the affected meridian.

V006-N01167.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01167.label: 本经配穴法
V006-N01167.englishNames: point combination of the same meridian; point combination on the same meridian/channel; combination of affected channel; association of affected channel; combination of affected meridian; association of affected meridian

V006-N01168.label: 表里配穴法
V006-N01168.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01168.definition: 在表里相合的经脉上选配腧穴用以治疗本脏本腑有关疾病的配穴方法。

V006-N01168.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01168.label: 表里经配穴法
V006-N01168.englishNames: exterior-interior meridian points combination; exterior-interior point combinnation
V006-N01168.pinyinNames: biao li jing pei xue fa
V006-N01168.definition: 除选取本经腧穴外，再选取与本经表里相合经脉的腧穴组成配穴，治疗本经本脏病及与其有关疾病的配穴方法。

V006-N01169.label: 主客配穴法
V006-N01169.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01169.definition: 主穴为主，客穴为辅，一主一客相配伍的配穴方法。

V006-N01169.label: 原络配穴法
V006-N01169.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01169.definition: 原穴与络穴相配伍使用的配穴方法。

V006-N01169.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01169.label: 主客原络配穴法
V006-N01169.englishNames: Host–guest combination using Yuan-source and Luo-connecting points
V006-N01169.pinyinNames: zhǔ kè yuán luò pèi xué fǎ
V006-N01169.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01169.definition: A point combination method to use the Yuan-primary point of the affected meridian coupled with the Luo-connecting point of its interiorly-exteriorly connected meridian. This method is often employed to treat problems of the zang–fu organs and meridians.

V006-N01169.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01169.label: 原络配穴法
V006-N01169.aliases: 主客配穴法、主客原络配穴法
V006-N01169.englishNames: source-connecting point combination; yuansource points and collateralpoints combination; Yuan and Luo point combination; source-connecting points combination
V006-N01169.pinyinNames: yuán luò pèi xué fǎ; yuan luo pei xue fa
V006-N01169.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01169.definition: A method to combine the Yuan-source and Luo-connecting points.

V006-N01169.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01169.label: 主客原络配穴法
V006-N01169.pinyinNames: zhu ke yuan luo pei xue fa

V006-N01170.label: 同名经配穴法
V006-N01170.englishNames: combination of points of namesake channels;combination of points of namesake meridians
V006-N01170.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01170.definition: 手足同名称的经脉所属穴配合同用的配穴方法。

V006-N01170.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01170.label: 同名经配穴法
V006-N01170.englishNames: combination of points of namesake channels; combinationd of points of namesake meridians; same name meridian points combination; Point combination of the same-name meridians
V006-N01170.pinyinNames: tong ming jing pei xue fa; tóng míng jīng pèi xué fǎ
V006-N01170.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01170.definition: A method to combine points from one hand meridian and one foot meridian that share the same name.

V006-N01171.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01171.label: 子母补泻法
V006-N01171.englishNames: Reinforcing the mother or reducing the son
V006-N01171.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01171.definition: One of the reinforcing or reducing manipulations. Manipulations of reinforcing the mother or reducing the son are selected according to deficiency or excess of the zang–fu organs or meridian problems.

V006-N01174.label: 上下配穴法
V006-N01174.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜针灸疗法及其他
V006-N01174.definition: 将上部腧穴与下部腧穴同时应用的配穴方法。

V006-N01174.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01174.label: 上下配穴法
V006-N01174.englishNames: superior-inferior point combination; upper-lower points combination; Upper and lower point combination; superior-inferior points combination; superiorinferior points association
V006-N01174.pinyinNames: shang xia pei xue fa; shàng xià pèi xué fǎ
V006-N01174.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01174.definition: A method to combine points on the upper and lower body.

V006-N01189.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V006-N01189.label: 子午流注
V006-N01189.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V006-N01189.definition: A special theory for point selection. The midnight-noon (Zi Wu) represents the time. The ebb-flow (Liu Zhu) refers to the circulation of qi and blood. This theory believes the meridian qi and blood flows from Zi time (11:00 pm–1:00 am) to Wu time (11:00 am–1:00 pm) and then from the Wu time to the Zi time. The yin qi becomes most abundant at the Zi time and then begins to decline, and the Yang qi starts to increase and becomes most abundant at the Wu time. Based on this theory, the five-Shu points located below the knee and elbow joints should be selected according to the designated hours.

V006-N01189.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V006-N01189.label: 子午流注
